"Correction of information on codes" document (CIS\_INFORMATION\_CHANGE).

For details of implementation, see True API document of v.519.0 dated June 16, 2025 (it is published in a user account on the production environment and in the knowledge base of the "Integrators Register").

#### v.427.0 dated June 10, 2025

# Planned:

▪️ Withdrawal of pet foods from circulation by volume and grade and cancellation of such withdrawal.

# v.426.0 dated June 9, 2025

# Implemented:

- ▪️ Correction of information about transfer of goods between business places for beer and low-alcohol beverages.
- ▪️ Cancellation of the "Withdrawal from circulation" document (LK\_RECEIPT) for the "Heaters", "Printed goods", "Pyrotechnic articles and fire safety and firefighting equipment" and "Building materials" goods groups.

For details of implementation, see True API document of v.517.0 dated June 9, 2025 (it is published in a user account on the production environment and in the knowledge base of the "Integrators Register").

▪️ Adding SIC and SPIC into the ACC for beauty products and household chemicals.

For details of implementation, see True API document of v.515.0 dated June 4, 2025 (it is published in a user account on the production environment and in the knowledge base of the "Integrators Register").

#### v.424.0 dated June 3, 2025

# Planned:

▪️ Partial disposal of veterinary medicines for some reasons of withdrawal from circulation.

#### v.422.0 dated May 30, 2025

# Implemented:

- ▪️ Submission of information about intention to export beer and low-alcohol beverages outside of the Russian Federation by using the "Notification of codes status" document (CIS\_NOTICE).
- ▪️ The "partialSaleInfo" parameter ("Information on partial disposal") is returned if quantity of the goods in a consumer package is more than one (a value of the "innerUnitCount" parameter ("Total number (volume / weight) of goods in a consumer package (for goods with the possibility of partial disposal)") is more than "1") in the "Method of receiving publicly available information on identification codes by list" and "Method for receiving publicly available brief information about ICs by list" methods.

For details of implementation, see True API document of v.512.0 dated May 30, 2025 (it is published in a user account on the production environment and in the knowledge base of the "Integrators Register").

# Implemented:

### v.416.0 dated May 15, 2025

# Implemented:

▪️ Sets were added for the printed, radio-electronic products and confectionery products

For details of implementation, see True API document of v.505.0 dated May 15, 2025 (it is published in a user account on the production environment and in the knowledge base of the "Integrators Register").

# v.415.0 dated May 14, 2025

# Planned:

▪️ The CONFORMITY\_CERTIFICATE permitting document (Certificate of conformity) will be available for the *"Perfumes and toilet preparations and household chemicals"* goods group when submitting information about introduction into circulation, as well as when correcting information about codes and remarking.

# Implemented:

- ▪️ Disaggregation of the aggregates that do not belong to a document sender is available in the "Disaggregation of packaging" document type (DISAGGREGATION\_DOCUMENT, DISAGGREGATION\_DOCUMENT\_XML), provided the following conditions are met:
  - GPIC / SIC / SPIC was formed during availability of volume and grade accounting;
- submission of the information about application of all ICs being part of the GPIC / SIC / SPIC has been registered before full [traceability](https://честныйзнак.рф/business/doc/?id=Прослеживаемость_товаров.html) is enabled

For details of implementation, see True API document of v.504.0 dated May 14, 2025 (it is published in

#### v.414.0 dated May 13, 2025

# Planned:

▪️ Correction of information on codes for the *"Groceries"* goods group.

# Implemented:

- ▪️ A possibility to obtain information about goods cards with a full data set has been implemented for the "Perfume and eau de toilette" goods group. For this purpose, the product-cards-perfume value (Report on goods cards — mandatory attributes (perfumery products)) was added for the reportId parameter (Identifier of the export type) in the "Obtaining information about goods cards" method.
- ▪️ For the *"Alternative tobacco products"*, *"Nicotine products"* and *"Tobacco products"* goods groups the True API methods that maintain backward compatibility have been reconfigured to receipt and return codes in a normalized format only - without parentheses:
  - Method of receiving publicly available information on identification codes by list;
  - Method for receiving publicly available brief information about ICs by list;
  - Method of receiving publicly available information on identification codes by list (simplified set of attributes);
  - Method for checking ICs of GG "Tobacco products" for gray zone.

For details of implementation, see True API document of v.503.0 dated May 13, 2025 (it is published in a user account on the production environment and in the knowledge base of the "Integrators Register").

#### v.413.0 dated May 7, 2025

# Implemented:

- ▪️ In the "Withdrawal from circulation" document type (LK\_RECEIPT, LK\_RECEIPT\_CSV, LK\_RECEIPT\_XML) the kpp (KPP of the goods circulation participant) and fias\_id (FIAS identifier) parameters are now available for all disposal reasons. The parameters are optional for all goods groups except the *"Alternative tobacco products"*, *"Nicotine products"*, *"Beer, beer-based and low-alcohol beverages"*, *"Tobacco products"*.
- ▪️ Indication of the identification codes of the sets is available for the *"Clothing items, bed, table, bath and kitchen linens"* goods group in the "ACC aggregation" (ATK\_AGGREGATION,

ATK\_AGGREGATION\_XML) and "ACC transformation" (ATK\_TRANSFORMATION) document types.

For details of implementation, see True API document of v.502.0 dated May 7, 2025 (it is published in a user account on the production environment and in the knowledge base of the "Integrators Register").

#### v.412.0 dated May 5, 2025

# Implemented:

- ▪️ The following documents in \* .json format are available for the *"Groceries"* and *"Perfumes and toilet preparations and household chemicals"* goods groups:
  - "Introduction into Circulation. Import with FCS" (LP\_FTS\_INTRODUCE) for the goods for which mandatory marking was introduced;
  - "ACC aggregation" (ATK\_AGGREGATION);
  - "ACC transformation" (ATK\_TRANSFORMATION);
  - "ACC disaggregation" (ATK\_DISAGGREGATION).
- ▪️ The following methods are available for the *"Pet foods"*, *"Vegetable oils"* goods groups:
  - Method of obtaining the current balance in a warehouse;
  - Method of getting a list of operations in a warehouse;
  - Obtaining information about virtual warehouse (export generation method).

For details of implementation, see True API document of v.500.0 dated May 5, 2025 (it is published in a user account on the production environment and in the knowledge base of the "Integrators Register").

#### v.411.0 dated April 30, 2025

# Partially implemented:

▪️ Submission of the "Cancellation of shipment via UTD" document (FIXATION\_CANCEL) in \* .json format is available **on the demo environment** for the *"Beer, beer-based and low-alcohol beverages"* goods group. By using this document you can submit information about cancellation of the "UTD (shipment of products)" document (FIXATION).

Planned: UTD cancellation for the beer and low-alcohol beverages (on the production environment).

# Implemented:

- ▪️ For the *"Perfumes and toilet preparations and household chemicals"* goods group: • the "Correction of information on codes" document (CIS\_INFORMATION\_CHANGE) is available;
  - starting from May 1, 2025, the "Remarking" document (LK\_REMARK) of \* .json format will be available with indication of the following reasons:
    - KM\_SPOILED (IM with MC spoiled or lost);
    - DESCRIPTION\_ERRORS (Errors in goods description found).
- ▪️ Submission of the "Cancellation of shipment via UTD" document (FIXATION\_CANCEL) in \* .json format is available on the demo environment for the *"Beer, beer-based and low-alcohol beverages"* goods group. By using this document you can submit information about cancellation of the "UTD (shipment of products)" document (FIXATION).

For details of implementation, see True API document of v.499.0 dated April 30, 2025 (it is published in a user account on the production environment and in the knowledge base of the "Integrators Register").

#### v.410.0 dated April 29, 2025

# Implemented:

▪️ The "Withdrawal from circulation" (LK\_RECEIPT) and "Cancellation of withdrawal from circulation" (LK\_RECEIPT\_CANCEL) documents of \* .json format have been implemented for the *"Lowalcohol drinks"* goods group.

For details of implementation, see True API document of v.498.0 dated April 29, 2025 (it is published in a user account on the production environment and in the knowledge base of the "Integrators Register").

# v.409.0 dated April 25, 2025

- ▪️ Checking the quality of filling in goods cards when introducing into circulation.
- ▪️ Export of marked beer and low-alcohol beverages outside of the Russian Federation.
- ▪️ Information on partial disposal.
- ▪️ The "Correction of information on codes" document (CIS\_INFORMATION\_CHANGE) will be available

for the *"Perfumes and toilet preparations and household chemicals"* goods group.

# Implemented:

▪️ The "Acceptance of the shipment from EEU" document (LP\_ACCEPT\_GOODS) submitted in response to the "Shipment from EEU" document (LP\_SHIP\_GOODS\_CROSSBORDER) when dealing with the Republic of Belarus has been implemented for the *"Groceries"* and *"Perfumes and toilet preparations and household chemicals"* goods groups.

For details of implementation, see True API document of v.497.0 dated April 25, 2025 (it is published in a user account on the production environment and in the knowledge base of the "Integrators Register").

v.408.0 dated April 24, 2025

# Planned:

  - Method of getting a list of operations in a warehouse;
  - Obtaining information about virtual warehouse (export generation method).

For description of the methods, see True API document.

v.407.0 dated April 23, 2025

# Planned:

|            |                         | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|            |                         | Indication of information about a permitting document will become<br>mandatory for the "Seafood", "Footwear", "Juice products and non<br>alcoholic beverages" goods groups in the "Introduction into Circulation.<br>Cross-border Trading" (CROSSBORDER), "Acceptance of shipment from<br>EEU" (LP_ACCEPT_GOODS) documents;<br>New values of the "document_type" / "primary_document_type" ("Type of<br>primary<br>document")<br>parameters<br>will<br>be<br>implemented<br>for<br>the<br>"PRODUCTION_USE" disposal reason ("Use for production purposes") in<br>the<br>"Withdrawal<br>from<br>circulation"<br>document<br>type<br>(LK_RECEIPT,<br>LK_RECEIPT_CSV, LK_RECEIPT_XML).<br>For more details, see section "Short description of modifications in the types<br>of documents of direct information submission" |
|            |                         | Implemented modifications                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|            |                         | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|            |                         | A re-verification of data specified in the "vsd_number" parameter ("AVD<br>identifier") for the documents that have been successfully processed during<br>the emergency mode (when FGIS VetIS is unavailable) has been improved<br>for the "Canned foods", "Pet foods", "Dairy products", "Seafood" goods<br>groups. If verification of the ICs being part of the GPIC / SIC fails,<br>unsuccessful verification results will be recorded for the GPIC / SIC as well.<br>Improvement has been implemented in the following document types:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|            |                         | •<br>"Introduction into Circulation. Manufacture in the Russian Federation"<br>(LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS,<br>LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS_CSV,<br>LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS_XML);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|            |                         | •<br>"Introduction<br>into<br>circulation.<br>Cross-border<br>Trading"<br>(CROSSBORDER);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|            |                         | •<br>"Introduction<br>into<br>circulation.<br>Contract<br>Manufacturing"<br>(LK_CONTRACT_COMMISSIONING,<br>LK_CONTRACT_COMMISSIONING_XML);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|            |                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |

Manufacture in the Russian Federation"<br>(LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS,<br>LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS_CSV,<br>LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS_XML), "Introduction into circulation. Contract<br>manufacturing"<br>(LK_CONTRACT_COMMISSIONING,<br>LK_CONTRACT_COMMISSIONING_XML)<br>and<br>"Correction<br>of<br>information on codes" (CIS_INFORMATION_CHANGE) |

| 04.02.2025 | 378.0         | Implemented modifications                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|            |               | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|            |               | The following modifications have been implemented in the "Withdrawal<br>from circulation" document (LK_RECEIPT):                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|            |               | •<br>new disposal reasons of * .json format were opened:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|            |               | ◦<br>"BY_SAMPLES"<br>("Sale<br>by<br>sample"),<br>"CONFISCATION"<br>("Confiscation"),<br>"DESTRUCTION"<br>("Destruction"),<br>"LOSS"<br>("Loss"), "STATE_CONTRACT" ("Sale under a state (municipal)<br>contract"), "UTILIZATION" ("Disposal")<br>—<br>for the "Non-alcoholic<br>beer" goods group;                                                                                                                    |
|            |               | ◦<br>"EXPIRATION"<br>("Expiration<br>date")<br>—<br>for<br>the<br>"Antiseptic/antibacterial<br>skin<br>cleansers<br>and<br>hand<br>sanitizers",<br>"Biologically active food additives", "Medical products" goods<br>groups;                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|            |               | ◦<br>"STATE_SECRET" ("Sale in deal with a state secret")<br>—<br>for the<br>"Canned foods", "Pet foods", "Seafood" goods groups;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|            |               | ◦<br>"VENDING"<br>("Sale<br>through<br>a<br>vending<br>machine")<br>—<br>for<br>the<br>"Antiseptic/antibacterial<br>skin<br>cleansers<br>and<br>hand<br>sanitizers",<br>"Biologically active food additives", "Perfume and eau de toilette",<br>"Canned foods", "Pet foods", "Medical products", "Seafood",<br>"Vegetable oils", "Photo cameras (except cine cameras), flash lights<br>and flash bulbs" goods groups. |
|            |               | •<br>the following disposal reasons were disabled:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|            |               | ◦<br>"PACKING"<br>("Prepacking"),<br>"RECALL"<br>("Recall<br>from<br>market")<br>—<br>for the "Veterinary medicines" goods group;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|            |               | ◦<br>"RETURN"<br>("Return<br>to<br>individual")<br>—<br>for<br>the<br>"Antiseptic/antibacterial<br>skin<br>cleansers<br>and<br>hand<br>sanitizers",<br>"Biologically active food additives", "Medical products" goods<br>groups;                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|            |               | ◦<br>"STATE_SECRET" ("Sale in deal with a state secret")<br>—<br>for the<br>"Beer, beer-based and low-alcohol beverages" goods group                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |

|            |                         | •<br>new disposal reasons will be opened for the following goods groups:<br>"Antiseptic/antibacterial skin cleansers and hand sanitizers", "Non<br>alcoholic<br>beer",<br>"Biologically<br>active<br>food<br>additives",<br>"Veterinary<br>medicines", "Perfume and Eau de Toilette", "Canned foods", "Pet<br>foods", "Medical products", "Seafood", "Beer, beer-based and low<br>alcohol beverages", "Vegetable oils", "Juice products and non-alcoholic<br>beverages", "Photo cameras (except for cine cameras), flash lights and<br>flash bulbs". Submission of the document with new disposal reasons<br>will be available only in * .json format;<br>•<br>some<br>existing<br>disposal<br>reasons<br>will<br>be<br>disabled<br>for<br>the<br>"Antiseptic/antibacterial<br>skin<br>cleansers<br>and<br>hand<br>sanitizers",<br>"Biologically active food additives", "Veterinary medicines", "Medical<br>products", "Beer, beer-based and low-alcohol beverages" goods groups. |

|            |                         | of documents of direct information submission"                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |

|            |         | The "tnved" parameter ("EEU FEACN code (10 digits)") will become<br>unavailable for the "Non-alcoholic beer" goods group in the "Correction of<br>information on codes" document (CIS_INFORMATION_CHANGE);<br>A new disposal reason is being implemented in the "Withdrawal from<br>circulation"<br>document<br>type<br>(LK_RECEIPT,<br>LK_RECEIPT_CSV,<br>LK_RECEIPT_XML) for the "Bicycles and bicycle frames" goods group;<br>A license verification will be enabled for the "Veterinary medicines" goods<br>group in the following documents: |
|            |         | •<br>"Introduction into circulation. Manufacturing in the Russian Federation"<br>(LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|            |         | •<br>"Introduction into Circulation. Contract Manufacturing in the Russian<br>Federation" (LK_CONTRACT_COMMISSIONING).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|            |         | The<br>"Correction<br>of<br>information<br>on<br>codes"<br>document<br>(CIS_INFORMATION_CHANGE) will be available for the "Bicycles and<br>bicycle frames", "Veterinary medicines" goods groups;<br>The "Introduction into circulation. Remaining items" document type<br>(LP_INTRODUCE_OST) will be available for new FEACN codes for the<br>"Clothing items, bed, table, bath and kitchen linens" goods group.                                                                                                                                  |
|            |         | For more details, see section "Short description of modifications in the types<br>of documents of direct information submission".                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|            |         | In the section "Short description of modifications in the types of documents<br>of direct information submission":                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|            |         | •<br>a<br>planned<br>date<br>of<br>the<br>opening<br>of<br>the<br>"Remarking"<br>document<br>(LK_REMARK) was deleted for the "Non-alcoholic beer" goods group;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |

Remaining items" document (LP_INTRODUCE_OST) will be<br>available for the "Medical products" goods group, but only for the goods<br>that are specified in the Decree of the Government of the Russian<br>Federation No. 744 of May 31, 2024 on approval of marking rules for<br>certain types of technical rehabilitation aids;<br>The "Introduction into circulation. Import with FCS" document type<br>(LP_FTS_INTRODUCE) has been implemented for the "Non-alcoholic<br>beer", "Veterinary medicines", "Pet foods" and "Vegetable oils" goods<br>groups;<br>The following document types have been implemented for the "Non<br>alcoholic beer", "Veterinary medicines", "Canned foods", "Pet foods" and<br>"Vegetable oils" goods groups:<br>•<br>"ACC aggregation" (ATK_AGGREGATION);<br>•<br>"ACC reaggregation" (ATK_TRANSFORMATION);<br>•<br>"ACC disaggregation" (ATK_DISAGGREGATION).<br>Names<br>of<br>the<br>following<br>document<br>types<br>were<br>changed<br>in<br>the<br>Catalog<br>—<br>Types of documents:<br>•<br>"Introduction into circulation. Contract manufacturing in the Russian<br>Federation" → "Introduction into circulation. | 19.09.2024 | 346.0         | Implemented modifications                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|            |               | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|            |               | Mandatory<br>of<br>the<br>"production_date"<br>parameter<br>("Date<br>of<br>goods<br>manufacture")<br>was<br>changed<br>in<br>the<br>"Introduction<br>into<br>Circulation.<br>Manufacture in the Russian Federation" (LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS,<br>LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS_CSV, LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS_XML) and<br>"Introduction<br>into<br>Circulation.<br>Contract<br>Manufacturing"<br>(LK_CONTRACT_COMMISSIONING,<br>LK_CONTRACT_COMMISSIONING_XML) documents as follows:<br>•<br>the parameter is optional for the "Clothing items, bed, table, bath and<br>kitchen linens", "Products made of real fur" and "New pneumatic rubber |
|            |               | tires and tire casings" goods groups;<br>•<br>the parameter is mandatory for other goods groups if a production date<br>is not specified in an application report for the units of goods, including<br>for ones that are nested into an aggregate.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|            |               | The "production_date" parameter ("Date of goods manufacture") has<br>become<br>mandatory<br>for<br>the<br>"Dairy<br>products"<br>goods<br>group<br>in<br>the<br>"Introduction<br>into<br>circulation.<br>Import<br>with<br>FCS"<br>document<br>(LP_FTS_INTRODUCE, LP_FTS_INTRODUCE_XML) if a production<br>date is not specified in an application report for the units of goods, including<br>for ones that are nested into an aggregate                                                                                                                                                                                |

|            |                         | parameter ("Unit price" / "The total value including VAT") has become                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|            |                         | mandatory if INN of the buyer ("buyer_inn") is specified, and a disposal<br>reason ("action") is:                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|            |                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |

|            |                         | •<br>"OWN_USE" ("Use for own purposes");                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|            |                         | •<br>"PRODUCTION_USE" ("Use for production purposes").                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |

|            |                         | •<br>"ACC aggregation" (ATK_AGGREGATION);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |

|            |                         | •<br>"ACC disaggregation" (ATK_DISAGGREGATION).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |

|            |         | The following modifications have been implemented in the "Return into                                                                    |
|            |         | circulation" document (LP_RETURN, LP_RETURN_XML):                                                                                        |
|            |         | •<br>submission of the document in both formats is unavailable for the "Non                                                              |
|            |         | alcoholic beer", "Bicycles and bicycle frames", "Veterinary medicines",                                                                  |
|            |         | "Games and toys for children", "Canned foods", "Pet foods", "Optical                                                                     |
|            |         | fiber and fiber optic products", "Heaters", "Perfumes and toilet<br>preparations and household chemicals", "Printed goods", "Pyrotechnic |
|            |         | articles and fire safety and firefighting equipment", "Radio-electronic                                                                  |
|            |         | products", "Vegetable oils", "Building materials", "Titanium metal                                                                       |
|            |         | products" goods groups;                                                                                                                  |
|            |         | •<br>for the document in * .json format:                                                                                                 |
|            |         | ◦<br>"PRODUCTION_USE_RETURN" return reason ("Return of the                                                                               |
|            |         | goods withdrawn from circulation for production purposes") was                                                                           |
|            |         | deleted;                                                                                                                                 |
|            |         | ◦<br>added:                                                                                                                              |
|            |         | ▪<br>"state_contract_id" parameter ("Identifier of the state contract");                                                                 |
|            |         | ▪<br>"STATE_CONTRACT_RETURN" return reason ("Return of                                                                                   |
|            |         | goods that were withdrawn from circulation for sale in deal with                                                                         |
|            |         | a state secret").                                                                                                                        |
|            |         | ◦<br>modified:                                                                                                                           |
|            |         | ▪<br>availability of return reasons and their dependence on disposal<br>reasons;                                                         |
|            |         | ▪<br>mandatory of parameters and requirements to their filling                                                                           |

| 10.07.2024 | 331.0                   | Announced modifications                                                                             |

For more details, see section "Short description<br>of<br>modifications<br>in<br>the<br>types<br>of<br>documents<br>of<br>direct<br>information<br>submission".<br>Implemented modifications<br>Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:<br>"BALANCE_CORRECTION" ("Correction of remaining goods (volume<br>and grade accounting)") disposal reason was removed from the "Withdrawal<br>from<br>circulation<br>(volume<br>and<br>grade<br>accounting)"<br>document<br>type<br>(LK_GTIN_RECEIPT) for the "Dairy products" goods group;<br>New disposal reasons have been implemented in the "Withdrawal from<br>circulation" document (LK_RECEIPT) of * .json format for the following<br>goods groups:<br>•<br>"Antiseptic/antibacterial<br>skin<br>cleansers<br>and<br>hand<br>sanitizers",<br>"Biologically active food additives"<br>—<br>"EXPIRATION" ("Expiration<br>date");<br>•<br>"Veterinary medicines"<br>—<br>"VETERINARY_USE" ("Use for veterinary<br>use");<br>•<br>"Medical<br>products"<br>—<br>"EXPIRATION"<br>("Expiration<br>date"),<br>"STATE_CONTRACT" ("Sale under a state (municipal) contract");<br>•<br>"Seafood"<br>—<br>"VENDING" ("Sale through a vending machine");<br>•<br>"Vegetable oils"<br>—<br>all reasons that are specified in the corresponding<br>catalog<br>for<br>the<br>document<br>"Withdrawal<br>from<br>circulation"<br>(LK_RECEIPT),<br>except<br>for<br>"RECALL"<br>("Recall<br>from<br>market"),<br>"RETURN" ("Return to individual"), "VENDING" ("Sale through a |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |

|            |                         | New response parameters are being implemented in the "codes" ("List of<br>ICs / ICMs") array and the "fiscalDriveNumber" ("Identifier of the fiscal<br>memory<br>device<br>(cash<br>registers)")<br>request<br>body<br>parameter<br>is<br>being<br>implemented as well in the "Method of MC verification and obtainment of<br>the brief information on goods" method. For more details, see section "Short<br>description of changes in True API methods" |
| 10.11.2023 | 258.0                   | Announced modifications                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|            |                         | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|            |                         | New disposal reasons will be implemented for the "Medical products"<br>goods<br>group<br>in<br>the<br>"Withdrawal<br>from<br>circulation"<br>document<br>type<br>(LK_RECEIPT,<br>LK_RECEIPT_CSV,<br>LK_RECEIPT_XML).<br>For<br>more<br>details, see section "Short description of modifications in the types of<br>documents of direct information submission"                                                                                            |

| Date       | Docume<br>nt<br>Version | Changes                                                                                                                                                                 |
|------------|-------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 09.11.2023 | 257.0                   | Implemented modifications<br>Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:                                                                  |
|            |                         | The<br>"Creating<br>sets"<br>(SETS_AGGREGATION,<br>SETS_AGGREGATION_XML) document type is available for the "Juice<br>products and non-alcoholic beverages" goods group |

| Date       | Docume  | Changes                                                                                    |
|------------|---------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|            | nt      |                                                                                            |
|            | Version |                                                                                            |
| 01.11.2023 | 256.0   | The "OMS API" section was deleted. You can familiarize yourself with the                   |
|            |         | planned changes in the OMS API in the "Planned changes in OMS API"                         |
|            |         | document published in the user account in the production environment and                   |
|            |         | in the knowledge base of the "Integrators Register".                                       |
|            |         | Implemented modifications                                                                  |
|            |         | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:                  |
|            |         | A possibility to submit information on aggregation of goods into the group                 |
|            |         | package has been implemented in the "Aggregation" document type                            |
|            |         | (AGGREGATION_DOCUMENT) for the "Antiseptic/antibacterial skin                              |
|            |         | cleansers<br>and<br>hand<br>sanitizers",<br>"Biologically<br>active<br>food<br>additives", |
|            |         | "Medical products", "Dairy products", "Seafood", "Beer, beer-based and                     |
|            |         | low-alcohol<br>beverages",<br>"Packaged<br>water"<br>goods<br>groups.<br>For<br>more       |
|            |         | information<br>about<br>restrictions<br>when<br>indicating<br>GPIC<br>in<br>the            |
|            |         | "unitSerialNumber" parameter ("Identification code of the aggregate"), see                 |
|            |         | "True API Description";                                                                    |
|            |         | It<br>is<br>possible<br>to<br>indicate<br>codes<br>that<br>have<br>the                     |
|            |         | "WAIT_TRANSFER_TO_OWNER"<br>extended<br>status<br>("Awaiting                               |
|            |         | transferring to an owner (contract manufacturing)"), as nestings in the                    |
|            |         | following<br>document<br>types:<br>"Aggregation"                                           |
|            |         | (AGGREGATION_DOCUMENT,<br>AGGREGATION_DOCUMENT_CSV,                                        |
|            |         | AGGREGATION_DOCUMENT_XML),<br>"Creating<br>sets"                                           |
|            |         | (SETS_AGGREGATION, SETS_AGGREGATION_XML). Following the                                    |
|            |         | successful processing of the document, the extended code status will be                    |
|            |         | removed;                                                                                   |
|            |         | Indication of the codes that have the "APPLIED_NOT_PAID" ("Unpaid")                        |
|            |         | status, both as an aggregate and nestings is unavailable in the "Aggregation"              |
|            |         | (AGGREGATION_DOCUMENT) document type for all operation types                               |
|            |         | ("AGGREGATION" ("Aggregation"), "SETS_AGGREGATION" ("Sets                                  |
|            |         | generation")) for the "Alternative tobacco products", "Nicotine products"                  |
|            |         | and "Tobacco products" goods groups                                                        |

| Date       | Docume        | Changes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|------------|---------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|            | nt<br>Version |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| 29.09.2023 | 248.0         | Modifications in OMS API methods                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|            |               | Implemented modifications                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|            |               | Indication of the SPIC of the format determined by a circulation participant<br>(from 18 to 74 characters long containing digits and letters of the Latin<br>alphabet, as well as special characters A-Z a-z 0-9 % & ' " ( ) * + , / : .<br>< = > ? !) is available for the "Antiseptic/antibacterial skin cleansers and<br>hand sanitizers", "Biologically active food additives" goods groups in the<br>"unitSerialNumber" ("Aggregate code"), "sntins" ("Array of codes of<br>nestings") parameters of the method "Send Report on MC Aggregation". A<br>structure<br>of<br>the<br>report<br>has<br>remained<br>unchanged<br>and<br>contains<br>the<br>"AggregationReport" basic object without extensions for the goods group.<br>For detailed description of the method, see documentation of the OMS API |
|            |               | Modifications that will be implemented from October 01, 2023:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|            |               | •<br>for the "Antiseptic/antibacterial skin cleansers and hand sanitizers",<br>"Biologically active food additives", "Medical products" goods groups<br>in the "Create marking code emission order" method:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|            |               | ◦<br>it is possible to indicate the "REMAINS" ("Remains marking")<br>value in the "releaseMethodType" ("Method of goods release into<br>circulation") parameter;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|            |               | ◦<br>"producer"<br>("INN<br>of<br>the<br>goods<br>card<br>owner")<br>conditionally<br>mandatory parameter is being added;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|            |               | ◦<br>"paymentType" ("Payment type") parameter with allowed values<br>"1"<br>("Payment<br>upon<br>emission")<br>and<br>"2"<br>("Payment<br>upon<br>application") is being added into a structure of the "Order" object in<br>connection with introduction of payment for a marking code<br>provision service.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|            |               | For detailed description of the method, see documentation of the OMS<br>API;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|            |               | •<br>MC expiration date is being activated for the "Medical products" goods<br>group                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |

| Date       | Docume<br>nt | Changes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|------------|--------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|            | Version      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| 28.09.2023 | 247.0        | Implemented modifications                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|            |              | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|            |              | In<br>the<br>document<br>type<br>"Correction<br>of<br>information<br>on<br>codes"<br>(CIS_INFORMATION_CHANGE):                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|            |              | •<br>information on codes can be modified by a goods circulation participant<br>that has performed their emission, application, or introduction into<br>circulation, but is not longer their owner;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|            |              | •<br>indication of the "vsd" ("AVD identifier"), "tnved" ("EEU FEACN<br>code") parameters is available to a goods circulation participant that has<br>applied a code;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|            |              | •<br>it is unavailable to change information on codes that have extended<br>status;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|            |              | •<br>it is possible to indicate the "vsd" ("AVD identifier") parameter for the<br>codes that have the "RETIRED" ("Disposed"), "WRITTEN_OFF"<br>("Written off") statuses;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|            |              | •<br>it is possible to indicate the "productionDate" ("Production date"),<br>"tnved" ("EEU FEACN code"), "permitDocs" ("Information on the<br>permitting documents"), "emissionType" ("Emission type") parameters<br>for the bundle codes;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|            |              | •<br>the<br>following<br>optional<br>parameters<br>have<br>been<br>implemented:<br>"variableExpiration"<br>("Information<br>on<br>variable<br>expiration<br>date"),<br>"permitDocsOperation"<br>("Operation<br>which<br>is<br>used<br>for<br>all<br>the<br>information<br>about<br>permitting<br>documents"),<br>"licencesOperation"<br>("Operation which is used for all the subsoil licenses"), "licences"<br>("Array of subsoil licenses"), "licence_number" ("Number of subsoil<br>license"), "licence_date" ("Issue date of the subsoil license"); |
|            |              | •<br>the following optional parameters are available for the "Alternative<br>tobacco products", "Tobacco products", "Nicotine products" goods<br>groups: "productionDate" ("Production date and time"), "permitDocs"<br>("Information<br>on<br>the<br>permitting<br>documents"),<br>"emissionType"<br>("Emission type");                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|            |              | •<br>indication of the "emissionType" ("Emission type") parameter is                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |

|            |               | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:<br>"vsd_number"<br>("AVD<br>number")<br>parameter,<br>which<br>is<br>mandatory<br>if<br>"veterinaryControl" ("Accountability attribute") is in active position in a<br>card of the goods in the NCMG, will be added into the "products" ("Array<br>containing a list of transferred goods codes") array for the "Seafood" goods<br>group<br>in<br>the<br>document<br>types<br>titled<br>"Introduction<br>into<br>circulation.<br>Manufacture in the Russian Federation" (LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS),<br>"Introduction<br>into<br>circulation.<br>Manufacturing<br>outside<br>of<br>EEU"<br>(LP_GOODS_IMPORT),<br>"Introduction<br>into<br>Circulation.<br>Contract<br>Manufacturing<br>in<br>the<br>Russian<br>Federation"<br>(LK_CONTRACT_COMMISSIONING) and "Introduction into Circulation.<br>Cross-border Trading" (CROSSBORDER).<br>For more details, see section "Short description of modifications in the types<br>of documents of direct information submission" |

| Date       | Docume  | Changes                                                                                                                          |
|------------|---------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|            | nt      |                                                                                                                                  |
|            | Version |                                                                                                                                  |
| 15.08.2023 | 237.0   | Announced modifications                                                                                                          |

|            |         | contract") field will be changed in the "Withdrawal from circulation"                                                            |

|            |         | "Withdrawal<br>from<br>circulation<br>(volume<br>and<br>grade<br>accounting)                                                     |

| Date       | Docume<br>nt<br>Version | Changes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|------------|-------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 14.08.2023 | 236.0                   | Announced modifications                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|            |                         | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|            |                         | In<br>the<br>"Correction<br>of<br>information<br>on<br>codes"<br>document<br>type<br>(CIS_INFORMATION_CHANGE):                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|            |                         | •<br>the<br>following<br>optional<br>parameters<br>will<br>be<br>implemented:<br>"variableExpiration"<br>("Information<br>on<br>variable<br>expiration<br>date"),<br>"permitDocsOperation"<br>("Operation<br>which<br>is<br>used<br>for<br>all<br>the<br>information<br>about<br>permitting<br>documents"),<br>"licencesOperation"<br>("Operation which is used for all the subsoil licenses"), "licences"<br>("Array of subsoil licenses"), "licence_number" ("Number of subsoil<br>license"), "licence_date" ("Issue date of the subsoil license"); |

|            |                         | •<br>a goods circulation participant that has applied MCs or has performed<br>introduction into circulation, will be able to change values of the "vsd"<br>("AVD identifier"), "tnved" ("EEU FEACN code") parameters;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|            |                         | •<br>you will be able to edit a value of the "vsd" ("AVD identifier")<br>parameter for the ICs that have "Written off", "Disposed" statuses;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|            |                         | •<br>you will be able to edit values of the "productionDate" ("Production<br>date<br>and<br>time"),<br>"tnved"<br>("EEU<br>FEACN<br>code"),<br>"permitDocs"<br>("Information<br>on<br>the<br>permitting<br>documents"),<br>"emissionType"<br>("Emission type") parameters for the PIC;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|            |                         | •<br>a change of the "emissionType" ("Emission type") parameter value will<br>be unavailable for IC and PIC nested into the aggregate;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|            |                         | •<br>IC / PIC that are specified in the "code" ("Array of the IC / PIC for<br>which information is edited") parameter should not have an extended<br>status.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |

|            |                         | 119                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |

                                                                                                                                                                            |
|            |               | Indication of the aggregate and nestings of the SPIC of the format<br>determined<br>by<br>a<br>circulation<br>participant<br>will<br>be<br>available<br>for<br>the<br>"Antiseptic/antibacterial skin cleansers and hand sanitizers", "Biologically<br>active food additives" goods groups in the method "Send Report on MC<br>Aggregation";<br>"producer" ("INN of the goods card owner") parameter will be added into<br>the<br>"Create<br>marking<br>code<br>emission<br>order"<br>method<br>for<br>the<br>"Antiseptic/antibacterial skin cleansers and hand sanitizers", "Biologically<br>active food additives", "Medical products" goods groups;<br>Indication of the "REMAINS" ("Remains marking") value will be available<br>in the "releaseMethodType" ("Method of goods release into circulation")<br>parameter of the "Create marking code emission order" method for the<br>"Antiseptic/antibacterial skin cleansers and hand sanitizers", "Biologically<br>active food additives", "Medical products", "Clothing items, bed, table, bath<br>and kitchen linens" goods groups. When remaining items are marked over<br>the original goods code, use of the serial numbers will be unavailable;<br>"paymentType" ("Payment type") parameter will be added into a structure<br>of the "Order" object of the "Create marking code emission order" method<br>for<br>the<br>"Antiseptic/antibacterial<br>skin<br>cleansers<br>and<br>hand<br>sanitizers",<br>"Biologically active food additives", "Medical products", "Juice products<br>and non-alcoholic beverages" goods groups;<br>MC expiration date with "Payment upon application" payment type will be<br>activated for the "Medical products" goods group;<br>The "producer" ("INN of the goods card owner") parameter will be<br>mandatory in the "Create marking code emission order" method for the<br>"Clothing items, bed, table, bath and kitchen linens" goods group if<br>"releaseMethodType" ("Method of Goods Release into Circulation") =<br>"REMAINS" ("Remains marking"), and a goods circulation participant is<br>not the owner of the goods code and does not have access to it by sub<br>account setting mechanism in the "National Catalog";<br>For the "Juice products and non-alcoholic beverages" goods group:<br>•<br>new values will be added into the "Create marking code emission order"<br>method for the "cisType" ("Marking code type") parameter; |
