|            |               | The following are being implemented for the "Beer, beer-based and low<br>alcohol beverages" goods group:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|            |               | •<br>"Connection<br>of<br>a<br>keg<br>to<br>bottling<br>equipment"<br>document<br>type<br>(CONNECT_TAP). For more details, see section "Short description of<br>modifications<br>in<br>the<br>types<br>of<br>documents<br>of<br>direct<br>information<br>submission";                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|            |               | •<br>"connectDate" ("Date of connection of a keg to bottling equipment"),<br>"ownerMod" ("Information on a current business place") response<br>parameters in the following methods: "Method of receiving publicly<br>available information on identification codes by list", "Method for<br>receiving publicly available brief information about ICs by list",<br>"Method of receiving publicly available information on identification<br>codes by list (simplified set of attributes)". For more details, see section<br>"Short description of changes in True API methods"; |
|            |               | •<br>extended IC status<br>—<br>"CONNECT_TAP" ("Connected to a tap (bottling<br>equipment)"). This status will be assigned only to IC of the keg ("KEG"<br>value is specified in the "Package characteristic" attribute in the goods<br>card in the NCMG) after the document "Connection of a keg to bottling<br>equipment" (CONNECT_TAP) has been processed successfully. IC with<br>such status will be unavailable for aggregation and movement                                                                                                                              |
| 30.06.2023 | 223.0         | Announced modifications                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|            |               | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|            |               | The date from which "licence_number" ("Number of subsoil license"),<br>"licence_date" ("License issue date") parameters will become mandatory in<br>certain types of the documents for the "Packages water" goods group, has<br>been updated. New date<br>—<br>August 01, 2023. For more details, see section<br>"Short description of modifications in the types of documents of direct<br>information submission"                                                                                                                                                             |

| 08.02.2023 | 170.0                   | Announced modifications in version 170.0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|            |                         | Discontinuation of support of TT GIS API and some True API methods                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|            |                         | API is being modified taking into account the development of the system, in<br>connection with which:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|            |                         | •<br>it is planned to disable TT GIS API methods and to stop publishing the<br>TT GIS API document from September 04, 2023. For more details, see<br>"TT GIS API Description" ("Discontinuation of support of TT GIS API<br>description" section);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|            |                         | •<br>support of some of True API methods will be discontinued, in the future<br>they will be disabled for use. For more details, see "True API<br>Description" ("Discontinued methods" section).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|            |                         | Implemented modifications                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|            |                         | "eliminationReason" ("Disposal reason") response parameter was added<br>into "Method for getting document content by identifier" and "Method of<br>receiving the list of documents loaded in TT GIS"<br>—<br>September 28, 2022;<br>"Method for verifying the readiness of the goods for export to EEU<br>countries" method has been implemented<br>—<br>November 02, 2022;<br>In<br>the<br>document<br>type<br>titled<br>"Singulation<br>of<br>ICM"<br>(LK_INDIVIDUALIZATION,<br>LK_INDIVIDUALIZATION_CSV,<br>LK_INDIVIDUALIZATION_XML) a check of the value in the "gtin"<br>("Goods code") parameter has been implemented as follows: a value should<br>be in the format of 14 digital characters, consisting of numbers from 0 to 9<br>with leading zeros for a goods code (GTIN) of 8, 12 or 13 digits<br>—<br>August<br>29, 2022 |
| 07.02.2023 | 169.0                   | Announced modifications in version 169.0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|            |                         | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:<br>"Shipping<br>with<br>withdrawal<br>from<br>circulation"<br>document<br>type<br>(LP_SHIP_RECEIPT,<br>LP_SHIP_RECEIPT_CSV,<br>LP_SHIP_RECEIPT_XML) is planned to be disabled. Instead of this<br>document, it is recommended to use "Withdrawal from circulation"<br>(LK_RECEIPT, LK_RECEIPT_CSV, LK_RECEIPT_XML)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |

|            |              | Modifications in True API methods:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |

|            |              | •<br>"ppr-1955-3-water" ("Volume of retail sales in terms of INNs and<br>addresses") in the "Obtaining information on volume of retail sales in<br>terms of INNs and addresses" method;                                                                                                                                                                            |

| 13.12.2022 | 146.0                   | Implemented modifications in version 146.0<br>Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:<br>The following have been implemented for the "Disposal" (WRITE_OFF)<br>document type for the "Alternative tobacco products", "Tobacco products",<br>"Nicotine products" goods groups:<br>•<br>a reason for withdrawal from circulation - "BEFORE_MARKING"<br>("Disposal before mandatory marking");<br>•<br>"sourceDocType" ("Type of primary document") and "sourceDocName"<br>("Name of primary document") optional parameters.<br>Submission of the "Disposal" document (WRITE_OFF) in the * .json<br>format by means of the "Single method of document creation" has been<br>implemented for all goods groups except for "Products made of real fur"<br>goods group |

| Date       | Docume<br>nt | Changes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |

|            | Version      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| 06.12.2022 | 142.0        | Implemented modifications in version 142.0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|            |              | Modifications in True API methods:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|            |              | Improvement of the mechanism to form exports of the data from the TT GIS<br>has been implemented (groups of the methods "Methods for generating data<br>downloading from TT GIS"). This allows to create exports of the data in<br>unlimited volume.                                                                                                                                  |
|            |              | This feature has been implemented by splitting of the downloaded archive<br>with data into parts. Parameters of the splitting performed are transferred in<br>new response parameters of the method titled "Method for getting final data<br>download IDs":                                                                                                                           |
|            |              | •<br>"resultFilePartsSize" ("Number of parts of the export file");<br>•<br>"resultFileParts" ("Information on parts of the export file"). The<br>parameter contains a list of the identifiers of the parts of the export in<br>"id" parameters ("ID of additional export file").                                                                                                      |
|            |              | "Method for getting ZIP file of the export" method has been improved to<br>receive each part of the segmented archive: "resultFilePartId" request<br>parameter<br>("ID<br>of<br>additional<br>export<br>file")<br>which<br>accepts<br>identifier<br>(transferred in the "id" ("ID of additional export file") parameters described<br>above) of the corresponding part has been added |
| 05.12.2022 | 141.0        | In the "Catalog - Disposal Reasons" a description of the<br>"NO_RETAIL_USE" reason ("Use for purposes of buyer") available only<br>for the "Shipping with withdrawal from circulation" document type<br>(LP_SHIP_RECEIPT, LP_SHIP_RECEIPT_CSV,<br>LP_SHIP_RECEIPT_XML) was added                                                                                                      |

The parameters obtained as a result of the splitting will<br>be transferred in new response parameters of the method titled "Method for<br>getting final data download IDs":                                                       |
|            |                         | •<br>"resultFilePartsSize" ("Number of parts of the export file");                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|            |                         | •<br>"resultFileParts" ("Information on parts of the export file"). The<br>parameter contains a list of the identifiers of the parts of the export in<br>"id" parameters ("ID of additional export file").                                                                                                                           |
|            |                         | "Method for getting ZIP file of the export" method will be improved to<br>receive an each part of the segmented archive: "resultFilePartId" request<br>parameter<br>("ID<br>of<br>additional<br>export<br>file")<br>which<br>accepts<br>identifier<br>(transferred in the "id" ("ID of additional export file") parameters described |
|            |                         | above) of the corresponding part will be added                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |

| Date       | Docume<br>nt<br>Version | Changes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|------------|-------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 23.11.2022 | 138.0                   | Implemented modifications in version 138.0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|            |                         | True API and TT GIS API                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|            |                         | A change in the role model has been implemented to restrict access to the<br>TT GIS features:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|            |                         | •<br>"Head of organization" role with a full set of access rights to the TT GIS<br>features has been added. The role will be assigned automatically when<br>registering with the TT GIS;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|            |                         | •<br>a set of the rights for the "Administrator" role remained identical to the<br>"Head of organization" role, except for the rights to sign contracts and<br>requests with the Operator (this feature is unavailable);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|            |                         | •<br>rights of the "Employee" role have been transferred to the new role -<br>"Employee with signature authority". A set of the rights remained<br>identical to the "Administrator" role, except for the rights to edit<br>organization<br>information<br>and<br>to<br>manage<br>users<br>(this<br>feature<br>is<br>unavailable);                                                                                                                                                    |
|            |                         | •<br>a role to add users without signature authority has been implemented<br>("Employee" role).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|            |                         | Access to the functionality is limited to viewing information for all<br>goods groups except for "Alternative tobacco products", "Nicotine<br>products", "Tobacco products". Creation of the documents of direct<br>information submission with a token of the role specified is unavailable<br>(a request to create a document will be processed with error 02<br>"Creation of the document " <document type="">" is unavailable for the<br/>role of the current user").</document> |
|            |                         | For the "Alternative tobacco products", "Tobacco products", "Nicotine<br>products"<br>goods<br>groups,<br>creation<br>of<br>the<br>documents<br>is<br>available<br>regardless of the user role, except for the "Withdrawal from circulation",<br>"ACC aggregation", "ACC transformation", "ACC disaggregation",<br>"Write-off" documents. When attempting to send one of the listed<br>documents, error with code 403 "Access denied" occurs.                                        |
|            |                         | There is no restriction on creation of the documents in the EDM.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|            |                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |

| Date       | Docume<br>nt<br>Version | Changes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|------------|-------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|            |                         | Only a user with "Head of organization" / "Administrator" role can assign<br>"Administrator", "Employee with signature authority" or "Employee" role.                                                                                                                                      |
|            |                         | Features to view a role of the current user, to edit an organization<br>information and to manage users, including their adding are available in the<br>TT GIS user interface in the "Profile" section in the "Users" tab.                                                                 |
| 22.11.2022 | 137.0                   | Announced modifications in version 137.0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|            |                         | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|            |                         | "Creating<br>sets"<br>document<br>type<br>(SETS_AGGREGATION,<br>SETS_AGGREGATION_CSV,<br>SETS_AGGREGATION_XML)<br>will<br>be<br>available<br>for<br>the<br>"Antiseptic/antibacterial<br>skin<br>cleansers<br>and<br>hand<br>sanitizers", "Biologically active food additives" goods groups |
| 22.11.2022 | 136.0                   | Announced modifications in version 136.0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|            |                         | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:<br>The following will be implemented for the "Disposal" (WRITE_OFF)<br>document type for the "Alternative tobacco products", "Tobacco products",<br>"Nicotine products" goods groups:                            |
|            |                         | •<br>a reason for withdrawal from circulation - "BEFORE_MARKING"<br>("Disposal before mandatory marking");                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|            |                         | •<br>"sourceDocType" ("Type of primary document") and "sourceDocName"<br>("Name of primary document") optional parameters.                                                                                                                                                                 |
|            |                         | Submission of the "Disposal" document (WRITE_OFF) in the * .json<br>format by means of the "Single method of document creation" will be<br>implemented for the "Alternative tobacco products", "Tobacco products",<br>"Nicotine products" goods groups                                     |
| 16.11.2022 | 135.0                   | "Catalog – Type of fur" was updated                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |

| Date       | Docume<br>nt<br>Version | Changes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|------------|-------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 15.11.2022 | 134.0                   | Implemented modifications in version 134.0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|            |                         | Modifications in True API methods:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|            |                         | A principle of the response generation has been changed in the method titled<br>"Public method of receiving the subscriber identifier in EDM Lite":                                                                                                                                                                     |
|            |                         | •<br>if a goods circulation participant is not registered with the TT GIS, the<br>following<br>error<br>message<br>will<br>be<br>returned:<br>"Organization<br>is<br>not<br>registered";                                                                                                                                |
|            |                         | •<br>if a goods circulation participant is blocked or has been deleted from the<br>TT GIS, the following error message will be returned: "Organization is<br>blocked";                                                                                                                                                  |
|            |                         | •<br>if a goods circulation participant is registered with the TT GIS, but is not<br>registered with EDM Lite, the following error message will be returned:<br>"GCP uses another EDM operator";                                                                                                                        |
|            |                         | •<br>if a goods circulation participant is registered with EDM Lite, but EDM<br>Lite is not specified as the main EDM provider, exchange participant ID<br>with the prefix "2LT–" will be returned in the following format<br>"2LT– <id edm="" exchange="" lite="" of="" participant="">" (e.g. 2LT-572279911);</id>    |
|            |                         | •<br>if a goods circulation participant is registered with EDM Lite and EDM<br>Lite is specified as the main EDM provider, goods circulation participant<br>ID with the prefix "2LT–" will be returned in the following format<br>"2LT– <id edm="" exchange="" lite="" of="" participant="">" (e.g. 2LT-572279911)</id> |
| 08.11.2022 | 133.0                   | Implemented modifications 133.0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|            |                         | OMS API                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|            |                         | "SET" ("Set") value of the "cisType" ("Marking code type") parameter has<br>been implemented for the "Biologically active food additives" goods group.<br>Marking codes of the sets are emitted based on templates "templateId" =<br>"23" and "templateId" = "30"                                                       |

| Date       | Docume        | Changes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|------------|---------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|            | nt<br>Version |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 03.11.2022 | 132.0         | Announced modifications in version 132.0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|            |               | True API and TT GIS API                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|            |               | A change in the role model is being implemented to restrict access to the TT<br>GIS features:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|            |               | •<br>"Head of organization" role with a full set of access rights to the TT GIS<br>features will be added. The role will be assigned automatically when<br>registering with the TT GIS;                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|            |               | •<br>a set of the rights for the "Administrator" role will remain identical to<br>the "Head of organization" role, except for the rights to sign contracts<br>and requests with the Operator (this feature will be unavailable);                                                                                                                                                                 |
|            |               | •<br>rights of the "Employee" role will be transferred to a new role -<br>"Employee with signature authority". A set of rights will remain<br>identical to the "Administrator" role, except for the rights to edit<br>organization information and to manage users (this feature will be<br>unavailable);                                                                                        |
|            |               | •<br>a role to add users without signature authority will be implemented<br>("Employee" role). Only rights to view information will be available to<br>these users. When you attempt to send a document of direct information<br>submission or a method request with a token of the specified user, "406<br>Not Acceptable" code and an empty response body will be returned in<br>the response. |
|            |               | Users who were registered with the TT GIS before the role model change,<br>will have the same set of rights as before the role model change.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|            |               | Only a user with "Head of organization" / "Administrator" role will have an<br>opportunity to assign "Administrator", "Employee with signature authority"<br>or "Employee" role when adding a user.                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|            |               | Features to view a role of the current user, to edit an organization<br>information and to manage users, including their adding are available in the<br>TT GIS user interface in the "Profile" section in the "Users" tab                                                                                                                                                                        |

Manufacture in<br>the<br>Russian<br>Federation"<br>(LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS,<br>LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS_CSV,<br>LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS_XML),<br>"Introduction<br>into<br>Circulation.<br>Manufacturing<br>outside<br>of<br>EEU"<br>(LP_GOODS_IMPORT,<br>LP_GOODS_IMPORT_CSV,<br>LP_GOODS_IMPORT_XML), "Introduction into Circulation. In the Territory of<br>EEU<br>Countries<br>(Contract<br>Manufacturing)"<br>(LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS_CROSSBORDER_CSD,<br>LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS_CROSSBORDER_CSD_CSV,<br>LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS_CROSSBORDER_CSD_XML), "Introduction<br>into<br>circulation.<br>Contract<br>manufacturing<br>in<br>the<br>Russian<br>Federation"<br>(LK_CONTRACT_COMMISSIONING,<br>LK_CONTRACT_COMMISSIONING_CSV,<br>LK_CONTRACT_COMMISSIONING_XML), "Shipment at Cross-border<br>Trading"<br>(LP_SHIP_GOODS_CROSSBORDER),<br>"Shipment<br>in<br>EEU<br>member states with IC recognition in case of volume and grade accounting<br>(export)"<br>(EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_EXPORT,<br>EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_EXPORT_CSV),<br>"Shipment<br>from<br>EEU<br>member states with recognition of ICs in case of volume and grade<br>accounting<br>(import)"<br>(EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_IMPORT),<br>"Acceptance of the shipment from EEU member states for "Shipment at<br>Cross-border Trading" document", "Acceptance of the shipment from EEU<br>member states with IC recognition in case of volume and grade accounting"<br>(EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_ACCEPTANCE,<br>EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_ACCEPTANCE_CSV),<br>"Remarking"<br>(LK_REMARK, LK_REMARK_CSV, LK_REMARK_XML) a range of<br>possible<br>values<br>in<br>case<br>of<br>indication<br>of<br>the<br>"STATE_REGISTRATION_CERTIFICATE" value in the "certificate_type"<br>parameter ("Type of the permitting document") has been expanded for the<br>"certificate_date" parameter ("Date of the permitting document"): from<br>1900-01-01 till the current date |

|            |         | Modifications in True API methods:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|            |         | In the " Method of receiving information on goods item by goods GTIN" of<br>version v4, an optional response parameter - "goodStatus" ("Status of the<br>goods card from the NCMG") was added. For owners and sub-accounts a<br>response of the specified method returns information on goods by goods<br>code (GTIN) with the following status of the goods card in the NCMG:<br>"draft" ("Draft", "Being moderated", "To be changed", "Awaiting for<br>signing"), "published" ("Goods card signed with EQES"), "archived"<br>("Archived goods card"); for non-owners — with a goods card status -<br>"published" ("Goods card signed with EQES"). Data of the "exporter"<br>("Applicant of product marked and introduced into circulation"), "address"<br>("Array of manufacturer's addresses") parameters are not returned in the<br>response of the specified method for goods circulation participants other<br>than owners. Receipt of the values in the "gcp" ("Global company identifier<br>in<br>GS1"),<br>"gln"<br>("Global<br>identifier<br>of<br>location"),<br>"goodSignedFlag"<br>("Indicator for signing of goods card in the NCMG"), "explain" ("Error in<br>filling out attributes and signing a goods card in the NCMG"), "gcp" ("GCP<br>of manufacturer"), "gln" ("GLN of manufacturer"), "authDocNumber"<br>("Number of authorization document") response parameters has been<br>implemented for sub-account. For goods circulation participants other than<br>owners and sub-accounts, it is possible to receive values of the following<br>response parameters: "goodMarkFlag" ("Indicator of readiness to the<br>marking"), "goodTurnFlag" ("Indicator of readiness to the circulation"),<br>"isKit"<br>("<br>"Bundle"<br>attribute<br>in<br>the<br>goods<br>card<br>in<br>the<br>NCMG"),<br>"isTechGtin" (""Technological" attribute in the goods card in the NCMG"),<br>"isSet" (""Set" attribute in the NCMG"), "setGtin" ("Array of codes of<br>goods<br>forming<br>part<br>of<br>the<br>set"),<br>"tnVedCode"<br>("FEACN<br>group"), |
|            |         | "tnVedCode10" ("FEACN code"), "okpd2Group" ("Code of OKPD2"),<br>"okpd2Code" ("Code of OKPD2 (optional)")                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|            |         | | 19.10.2022 | 123.0                   | Implemented modifications in version 123.0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|            |                         | Modifications in True API methods:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|            |                         | "Method for calculating an IC quantity on the basis of weight of goods" has<br>been implemented. A response of the method returns information on<br>quantity of the units of goods for each requested pair of the goods code and<br>weight in grams. If attributes on the weight characteristics of the goods are<br>not filled in or filled in incorrectly in the goods card in the NCMG, a<br>response of the method will not contain information on the IC quantity<br>"coreWeight" response parameter ("Measured weight (average weight) of<br>the product in grams") was added into the section titled "Additional<br>parameters for GG "Dairy products"" |
| 19.10.2022 | 122.0                   | Announced modifications in version 122.0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|            |                         | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:<br>As a result of successful processing of the "Remarking" document type<br>(LK_REMARK, LK_REMARK_CSV, LK_REMARK_XML) in which<br>previous and new ICs / ICMs received for one goods code have been<br>specified by agent, new IC / ICM will obtain an attribute that it has been<br>transferred under ACS with indication of the owner who transferred this IC /<br>ICM to the agent (for more details, see "Short description of modifications<br>in the types of documents of direct information submission")                                                                     |

FCS import. Fur"<br>(FURS_FTS_INTRODUCE,<br>FURS_FTS_INTRODUCE_CSV,<br>FURS_FTS_INTRODUCE_XML),<br>"goods_description"<br>("Goods<br>description") parameter became optional. Requirements for ICMs specified<br>in the "cis" parameter ("ICM No.") have been updated (ICMs become<br>available with the following extended statuses: "INDIVIDUAL" ("ICM has<br>been singulated"), "NON_INDIVIDUAL" ("ICM has not been singulated"),<br>"FTS_RESPOND_NOT_OK"<br>("Negative<br>FCS<br>decision"),<br>"FTS_RESPOND_NOT_OK_NON_INDIVIDUAL"<br>("Negative<br>FCS<br>decision. Fur" document (FURS_FTS_INTRODUCE,<br>FURS_FTS_INTRODUCE_CSV, FURS_FTS_INTRODUCE_XML) ceases<br>to be the only condition for changing the ICM status) |

|            |               | Modifications in True API methods:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|            |               | "Method of receiving publicly available information on identification codes<br>by list":                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|            |               | •<br>Searching for ICs with and without maximum retail sale price has been<br>implemented<br>for<br>packs<br>and<br>blocks<br>for<br>the<br>"Alternative<br>tobacco<br>products", "Tobacco products", "Nicotine products" goods groups;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|            |               | •<br>"packageType"<br>("Package<br>type<br>code"),<br>"сisTrackingType"<br>("Traceability type") response parameters and an error code with value<br>"701" have been added;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|            |               | •<br>"tnVedEaes" ("10-digit FEACN code"), "tnVedEaesGroup" ("4-digit<br>FEACN code"), "productName" ("Product name"), "brand" ("Brand")<br>parameters are not returned in the response if a value of the<br>"generalPackageType" response parameter ("Common type of the<br>package") is equal to "АТК" ("Aggregated customs code") or "BOX"<br>("Shipping package");                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|            |               | •<br>"certDoc" array ("Document of mandatory certification") with "type"<br>("Type of document of mandatory certification"), "number" ("Number<br>of document of mandatory certification"), "date" ("Issue date of<br>document of mandatory certification") parameters is not returned in the<br>response if there is no information on permitting documents for IC /<br>ICM;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|            |               | •<br>"CONFORMITY_CERTIFICATE_OR_DECLARATION" ("Certificate<br>or declaration of conformity") possible value has been added for the<br>"type" ("Type of document of mandatory certification") response<br>parameter. If error in requesting information on goods by goods code of<br>the IC requested is returned from "National catalog of marked goods"<br>for "brand" ("Brand"), "tnVedEaesGroup" ("4-digit FEACN code"),<br>"tnVedEaes"<br>("10-digit<br>FEACN<br>code"),<br>"productName"<br>("Product<br>name") response parameters, error 504 and error message "No system<br>response" are returned for such IC, "productGroup" ("Name of the<br>goods group"), "cis" ("IC from the response"), "gtin" ("Goods code")<br>response parameters became mandatory, "status" ("IC status") response |
|            |               |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |

| Date | Docume  | Changes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|------|---------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|      | nt      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|      | Version |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|      |         | •<br>"EMPTY" ("No value") value is returned in the "statusEx" response<br>parameter ("Current extended IC / ICM status") if there is no extended<br>status;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|      |         | •<br>a type of "expirations" response parameter ("Array of expiration dates")<br>has been changed changed from "array" to "array[object]", a type of the<br>"licences" response parameter ("Array of subsoil licenses") has been<br>changed<br>from<br>"array<br>of<br>string"<br>to<br>"array[object]",<br>in<br>"expirationStorageDate" ("Expiration date"), "licenceDate" ("License<br>issue date") response parameters a value is returned in a format of yyyy<br>MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSZ;                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|      |         | •<br>"generalPackageType" ("Common type of the package") response<br>parameter has been added, "partialSaleInfo" ("Object of parameters of<br>partial disposal") response parameter returns only to identification code<br>owner, Operator and federal executive body, "withdrawReasonOther"<br>("Description of other reason for withdrawal from circulation") response<br>parameter returns only if "withdrawReason" ("Reason for withdrawal<br>from circulation") = "OTHER" (Other), "productName" ("Product<br>name") response parameter returns non-empty value from "National<br>catalog of marked goods" for goods item, bundle, set and group package<br>or a value is missing. |
|      |         | "Method for receiving publicly available brief information about ICs by<br>list":                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|      |         | •<br>"requestedCis" ("IC from the request") response parameter became<br>mandatory, "cis" ("IC"), "status" ("IC status code"), "packageType"<br>("Package type code"), "emissionDate" ("Emission date") response<br>parameters have became optional;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|      |         | •<br>"tnVedEaes" ("10-digit FEACN code"), "tnVedEaesGroup" ("EEU<br>FEACN code of goods item"), "productName" ("Product name")<br>parameters are not returned in the response, if a value of the<br>"generalPackageType" response parameter ("Common type of the<br>package") is equal to "АТК" ("Aggregated customs code") or "BOX"<br>("Shipping package"), "child" ("List of child ICs in aggregate"),<br>"productGroupId" ("Goods group ID"), "productGroup" ("Goods group<br>name") response parameters are returned, even for disaggregated                                                                                                                                       |
|      |         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |

Manufacture in the<br>Russian<br>Federation"<br>and<br>"Introduction<br>into<br>circulation.<br>Contract<br>manufacturing in the Russian Federation" document types, has been deleted |

|            |               | Modifications in True API methods:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|            |               | In the " Method of receiving information on goods item by goods GTIN" of<br>version v4, an optional response parameter - "goodStatus" ("Status of the<br>goods card from the NCMG") will be added. A response of the method will<br>return information for owners and sub- accounts on goods by goods code<br>(GTIN) with the following status of the goods card from the NCMG: "draft"<br>(Goods card in the different statuses in the NCMG: "Draft", "Being<br>moderated",<br>"To<br>be<br>changed",<br>"Awaiting<br>for<br>signing"),<br>"published"<br>("Goods card signed with EQES"), "archived" ("Archived goods card"), for<br>non-owners — with a goods card status - "published" ("Goods card signed<br>with EQES"). Data of the "exporter" ("Applicant of product marked and<br>introduced<br>into<br>circulation"),<br>"address"<br>("Array<br>of<br>manufacturer's<br>addresses") parameters will not be returned in the response of the method<br>specified for goods circulation participants other than owners; sub-account<br>can receive values in the following response parameters: "gcp" ("Global<br>company identifier in GS1"), "gln" ("Global identifier of location"),<br>"goodSignedFlag" ("Indicator for signing of goods card in the NCMG"),<br>"explain" ("Error in filling out attributes and signing a goods card in the<br>NCMG"), "gcp" ("GCP of manufacturer"), "gln" ("GLN of manufacturer"),<br>"authDocNumber" ("Number of authorization document"). For goods<br>circulation participants other than owners and sub-accounts, it is possible to<br>receive values of the following response parameters: "goodMarkFlag"<br>("Indicator of readiness to the marking"), "goodTurnFlag" ("Indicator of<br>readiness to the circulation"), "isKit" (" "Bundle" attribute in the goods card<br>in the NCMG"), "isTechGtin" (""Technological" attribute in the goods card<br>in the NCMG"), "isSet" (""Set" attribute in the NCMG"), "setGtin" ("Array<br>of codes of goods forming part of the set"), "tnVedCode" ("FEACN<br>group"), "tnVedCode10" ("FEACN code"), "okpd2Group" ("Code of<br>OKPD2"), "okpd2Code" ("Code of OKPD2 (optional)");<br>"isActiveIngredientEthanol" parameter ("Active substance is alcohol") was<br>added<br>into<br>the<br>catalog<br>"Additional<br>parameters<br>for<br>GG<br>"Antiseptic/antibacterial skin cleansers and hand sanitizers"" |

|            |              | Installation of modifications of the methods titled "Method of receiving<br>publicly available information on identification codes by list", "Method for<br>receiving publicly available brief information about ICs by list", "Method of<br>receiving publicly available information on identification codes by list<br>(simplified set of attributes)" announced in the document versions of 17.0,<br>29.0, 52.0, 90.0 and 95.0 on the production environment is planned for<br>October 10, 2022.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|            |              | "tnVedEaes"<br>("10-digit<br>FEACN<br>code"),<br>"tnVedEaesGroup"<br>("4-digit<br>FEACN code"), "productName" ("Product name"), "brand" ("Brand")<br>parameters will not be returned in the response of the method "Method of<br>receiving publicly available information on identification codes by list" if a<br>value of the "generalPackageType" ("Common type of the package")<br>response parameter is equal to "АТК" ("Aggregated customs code");<br>"tnVedEaes" ("10-digit FEACN code"), "tnVedEaesGroup" ("EEU FEACN<br>code of goods item"), "productName" ("Product name") parameters will not<br>be returned in the response of the method "Method for receiving publicly<br>available<br>brief<br>information<br>about<br>ICs<br>by<br>list",<br>if<br>a<br>value<br>of<br>the<br>"generalPackageType"<br>response<br>parameter<br>("Common<br>type<br>of<br>the<br>package") is equal to "АТК" ("Aggregated customs code"); "child" ("List of<br>child<br>ICs<br>in<br>aggregate"),<br>"productGroupId"<br>("Goods<br>group<br>ID"),<br>"productGroup" ("Goods group name") response parameters will be<br>returned, even for disaggregated aggregates of all goods groups except<br>"Alternative tobacco products", "Nicotine products", "Tobacco products";<br>In the section titled "Short description of changes in True API methods",<br>information has been deleted that "Method for receiving publicly available<br>brief information about ICs by list" will not return "certDoc" array<br>("Document of mandatory certification") with "type" ("Type of document of<br>mandatory certification"), "number" ("Number of document of mandatory<br>certification"), "date" ("Issue date of document of mandatory certification")<br>parameters in the response if there is no information on permitting<br>documents for IC / ICM and that information for disaggregated aggregates<br>will be returned in the response parameters |

Fur"<br>(FURS_FTS_INTRODUCE,<br>FURS_FTS_INTRODUCE_CSV,<br>FURS_FTS_INTRODUCE_XML),<br>"goods_description"<br>("Goods<br>description") parameter will become optional. |            |               | specified in the "cis" parameter ("ICM No.") will be updated (ICMs become<br>available with the following extended statuses: "INDIVIDUAL" ("ICM has<br>been singulated"), "NON_INDIVIDUAL" ("ICM has not been singulated"),<br>"FTS_RESPOND_NOT_OK"<br>("Negative<br>FCS<br>decision"),<br>"FTS_RESPOND_NOT_OK_NON_INDIVIDUAL"<br>("Negative<br>FCS<br>decision. Not singulated)). The conditions required to change an ICM status<br>to<br>"In<br>circulation"<br>will<br>be<br>changed<br>(successful<br>processing<br>of<br>the<br>"Introduction<br>into<br>Circulation.<br>FCS<br>import.<br>Fur"<br>document<br>(FURS_FTS_INTRODUCE,<br>FURS_FTS_INTRODUCE_CSV,<br>FURS_FTS_INTRODUCE_XML) ceases to be the only condition for<br>changing the ICM status) |

| 08.09.2022 | 93.0                    | Implemented modifications in version 93.0<br>OMS API<br>A check of the order for compliance with the data of the goods card in the<br>NCMG has been implemented for the "Alternative tobacco products",<br>"Tobacco products", "Nicotine products" goods groups. The check of the<br>order for compliance with the data from the goods card is carried out after<br>creation of the order (asynchronously);<br>A check of the value in the "gtin" ("Goods code") parameter in the method<br>"Generate a request for ICM creation" has been implemented for the<br>"Products made of real fur" goods group (the demo environment): a value<br>should be in the format of 14 digital characters, consisting of digits from 0<br>to 9 with leading zeros for a goods code (GTIN) of 8, 12 or 13 digits length;<br>On the demo environment, disabling support of the attached signature has<br>been implemented;<br>OMS API 3.0 has been implemented on the demo environment to switch to<br>a unified structure of the requests and to exclude extension ("extension") |
| 07.09.2022 | 92.0                    | from URL structure:<br>•<br>maximum number of the MCs in the order has been increased to 2<br>million;<br>•<br>order can be created only for 1 goods code (GTIN);<br>•<br>all documents shall be signed with EQES<br>In the "Catalog - Disposal Reasons", "Products made of real fur" goods                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|            |                         | group was added for the "PRODUCTION_USE" disposal reason ("Use for<br>production purposes") \                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
