|            |                 | Modifications in True API methods:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|            |                 | Installation of the modifications listed below on the production environment<br>is planned for October 10, 2022:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|            |                 | •<br>if there is no extended status for IC / ICM, "EMPTY" ("No value")<br>value will be returned instead of the "null" in "Method of receiving<br>publicly available information on identification codes by list" in<br>"statusEx" response parameter ("Current extended IC / ICM status") and<br>"Method for receiving publicly available brief information about ICs by<br>list" in the "statusEx" response parameter ("Extended IC / ICM status").<br>"certDoc" array ("Document of mandatory certification") with "type"<br>("Type of document of mandatory certification"), "number" ("Number<br>of document of mandatory certification"), "date" ("Issue date of<br>document of mandatory certification") parameters will not be returned in<br>the responses of the methods specified if there is no information on<br>permitting documents for IC / ICM; |
|            |                 | •<br>"tnVedEaes" ("10-digit FEACN code"), "tnVedEaesGroup" ("4-digit<br>FEACN code"), "productName" ("Product name"), "brand" ("Brand")<br>parameters will not be returned in the response of the method "Method<br>of receiving publicly available information on identification codes by<br>list" if a value of the "generalPackageType" ("Common type of the<br>package") response parameter is equal to "BOX" ("Shipping package");                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|            |                 | •<br>"tnVedEaes" ("10-digit FEACN code"), "tnVedEaesGroup" ("EEU<br>FEACN code of goods item"), "productName" ("Product name")<br>parameters will not be returned in the response of the method "Method<br>for receiving publicly available brief information about ICs by list" if a<br>value of the "generalPackageType" ("Common type of the package")<br>response parameter is equal to"BOX" ("Shipping package"). Data for<br>disaggregated aggregates will be returned in the response parameters;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|            |                 | •<br>in the method titled "Method of receiving publicly available information<br>on identification codes by list (simplified set of attributes)" in the<br>"extendedPackageType" ("Package type") response parameter, a value<br>will be equal to a synonym of the package type code, "applicationDate"<br>("Application date") parameter will not be returned in the method                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |

| 06.09.2022 | 89.0          | Implemented modifications in version 89.0                                                                                                                      |
|            |               | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:                                                                                      |
|            |               | "TRANSFER_UNREGISTERED" disposal reason ("Sale to unregistered                                                                                                 |
|            |               | goods circulation participant") has been implemented for the "Withdrawal<br>from<br>circulation<br>(volume<br>and<br>grade<br>accounting)"<br>document<br>type |
|            |               | (LK_GTIN_RECEIPT).<br>When<br>this<br>reason<br>is<br>specified,<br>"buyer_inn"                                                                                |
|            |               | parameter ("Buyer's INN") becomes mandatory, while the buyer shall not                                                                                         |
|            |               | be registered in the TT GIS or a goods group in the request shall not be<br>available to the buyer. When this reason is specified in the "document_type"       |
|            |               | parameter ("Type of primary document") a value shall comply with                                                                                               |
|            |               | "CONSIGNMENT_NOTE"<br>("Packing<br>list"),<br>"product_cost"<br>parameter                                                                                      |
|            |               | ("Unit price") shall be filled in                                                                                                                              |

|            |               | unregistered goods circulation participant") was added into "Catalog -<br>Disposal Reasons"                                                                    |
| 06.09.2022 | 88.0          | Announced modifications in version 88.0                                                                                                                        |
|            |               | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:                                                                                      |
|            |               | A goods code specified in the "gtin" ("Goods code") parameter in the                                                                                           |
|            |               | "Acceptance of the shipment from EEU member states with IC recognition                                                                                         |
|            |               | in<br>case<br>of<br>volume<br>and<br>grade<br>accounting"<br>document<br>type                                                                                  |

|            |               | number for the same goods codes                                                                                                                                |

|            |               | In the "Method for getting document content by identifier", an optional<br>response<br>parameter<br>-<br>"easCrossborderExportAcceptance"<br>("Acceptance<br>No.") was added (for "Acceptance of shipment to EEU with IC recognition<br>(export)"<br>(EAS_CROSSBORDER_EXPORT_ACCEPTANCE),<br>"Acceptance of the shipment in EEU member states with IC recognition in<br>case<br>of<br>volume<br>and<br>grade<br>accounting"<br>(EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_EXPORT_ACCEPTANCE) documents);<br>A cumulative limitation on the maximum number of creation of the tasks for<br>export for one goods group (10 times per day) has been implemented for the<br>following data export methods: "Obtaining information on wholesales and<br>retail sales in terms of INN", "Obtaining information on inventory<br>turnover", "Obtaining information on volume of retail sales in terms of<br>INNs and addresses", "Obtaining information on volume-weighted average<br>price in terms of GTIN". When the specified limitation is reached, creation<br>of the task for export will be available the next day. |

| nt<br>Version      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                    |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| 31.08.2022<br>86.0 | Implemented modifications in version 86.0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                    | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                    | "gtin_weight" ("Weight in grams") optional parameter was added into the<br>"Withdrawal<br>from<br>circulation<br>(volume<br>and<br>grade<br>accounting)"<br>(LK_GTIN_RECEIPT) document type for the "Dairy products" goods<br>group. Total weight of all goods by a goods code specified in the "gtin"<br>parameter ("Goods code") in grams is specified in this parameter, if the<br>goods have an attribute of variable weight ("Yes" value is specified in the<br>attribute "Goods with variable quantity" in the goods card in the NCMG)<br>and is transferred to the TT GIS warehouse balance. If there is no value<br>specified for such parameter, an arithmetic mean of the "Weight range,<br>from" and "Weight range, to" attributes specified in the goods card in the<br>NCMG will be transmitted to the TT GIS warehouse. If the value is<br>specified for the goods which do not have an attribute of variable weight or<br>for goods for which there is no value in the "Goods with variable quantity"<br>attribute in the NCMG, a value specified in the goods card in the NCMG<br>will be transmitted to the TT GIS warehouse and not a value from this<br>parameter. If a weight value is specified in this parameter, and a volume is<br>specified in the card of the corresponding goods code in the NCMG, the<br>weight value will be ignored and the volume value specified in the goods<br>card in the NCMG will be transmitted to the TT GIS warehouse.<br>Modifications in True API methods:<br>For the "Dairy products" goods group, a value from the "gtin_weight" |
|                    | parameter<br>("Weight<br>in<br>grams")<br>specified<br>in<br>the<br>"Withdrawal<br>from<br>circulation<br>(volume<br>and<br>grade<br>accounting)"<br>document<br>(LK_GTIN_RECEIPT) is returned in the "netWeight" response parameter<br>("A total weight of the goods on the balance sheet for the current date, in<br>grams") of the "Method of obtaining of the current balance in a warehouse"<br>for the goods with an attribute of variable weight. If there is no value<br>specified for such goods, an arithmetic mean of the "Weight range, from"<br>and "Weight range, to" attributes specified in the goods card in the NCMG<br>will be transmitted to the TT GIS warehouse. If a weight is not specified in<br>the "gtin_weight" parameter ("Weight in grams") in the "Withdrawal from                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                    | circulation (volume and grade accounting)" document and a weight or                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |

| Date       | Docume  | Changes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|------------|---------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|            | nt      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|            | Version |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|            |         | For goods without an attribute of variable weight ("No" value is indicated in<br>the "Goods with variable quantity" attribute in the goods card in the NCMG)<br>or for goods for which there is no value in the "Goods with variable<br>quantity" attribute in the NCMG, a value corresponds to a value from a<br>goods card in the NCMG. If a value of the weight or volume is equal 0 in<br>the goods card in the NCMG, "netWeight" parameter ("A total weight of the<br>goods on the balance sheet for the current date, in grams") is not returned in<br>the response;<br>A possibility of obtaining volume and weight characteristics of the goods<br>has been added for the "Dairy products" and "Packaged water" goods<br>groups in the "netWeight" ("Weight of transferred goods") and "volume"<br>("Volume of transferred goods") response parameters for certain documents<br>affecting the balance in the "Method of getting a list of operations in a<br>warehouse"                                                                         |
| 31.08.2022 | 85.0    | Implemented modifications in version 85.0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|            |         | Modifications in True API methods:<br>In the "Method of obtaining of the current balance in a warehouse", a<br>possibility of obtaining volume and weight characteristics of the goods for<br>the certain document types affecting the balance has been added in the<br>"netWeight" ("A total weight of the goods on the balance sheet for the<br>current date, in grams") and "volume" ("A total volume of the goods on the<br>balance sheet for the current date, in milliliters") response parameters,<br>obtainment of the value for the "Dairy products" goods group in a certain<br>parameter depends on a type (grams / milliliters) with which the value has<br>been specified in the "Declared volume / net weight" attribute in the goods<br>card in the NCMG, a value of the parameter depends on availability of the<br>attribute of variable quantity and a type of the goods traceability, for the<br>"Packaged water" goods group a value of the parameter corresponds to a<br>value specified in the card of the goods code in the NCMG |

| Date       | Docume<br>nt<br>Version | Changes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|------------|-------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 30.08.2022 | 84.0                    | The following codes were added into "Catalog – Codes of marking codes<br>processing result": 11 ("A weight (AI3103) of the goods is not specified<br>("Dairy products" goods group)"), 12 ("A card of the goods (GTIN) is<br>missing in the NCMG"), 13 ("A weight (AI3103) of the goods is specified<br>("Dairy products" goods group)"), 132 ("Incorrect (invalid) description of<br>the conditions for storage of goods is specified in the report")                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 26.08.2022 | 83.0                    | Implemented modifications in version 83.0<br>Modifications in OMS API methods<br>In the method titled "Send Report on MC Aggregation" a SPIC value in the<br>"unitSerialNumber" document body parameter ("Identification code of the<br>aggregation unit") for all goods groups shall not correspond to mask<br>02[gtin]37[count] or mask 02[gtin]37[count]3103[netWeight]. These masks<br>are used to transmit information on a volume and grade of the goods to the<br>TT GIS. In case if SPIC is specified with one of these masks, a report will<br>be processed with error.<br>Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:<br>In<br>the<br>document<br>types<br>titled<br>"Aggregation"<br>(AGGREGATION_DOCUMENT,<br>AGGREGATION_DOCUMENT_CSV,<br>AGGREGATION_DOCUMENT_XML)<br>and<br>"Aggregation"<br>(AGGREGATION_DOCUMENT) for all goods groups for which these<br>document<br>types<br>are<br>available,<br>a<br>value<br>of<br>the<br>SPIC<br>in<br>the<br>"unitSerialNumber" parameter ("Aggregate identification code") shall not<br>correspond<br>to<br>mask<br>02[gtin]37[count]<br>or<br>mask<br>02[gtin]37[count]3103[netWeight].<br>These<br>masks<br>are<br>used<br>to<br>transmit<br>information on a volume and grade of the goods to the TT GIS. In case if<br>SPIC is specified with one of these masks, a document will be processed<br>with error |

|            |              | OMS API                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|            |              | A check of the value in the "gtin" ("Goods code") parameter in the method<br>"Generate a request for ICM creation" method will be performed for the<br>"Products made of real fur" goods group (the demo environment): a value<br>should be in the format of 14 digital characters, consisting of numbers from<br>0 to 9 with leading zeros for a goods code (GTIN) of 8, 12 or 13 digits<br>Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:<br>In<br>the<br>document<br>type<br>titled<br>"Singulation<br>of<br>ICM"<br>(LK_INDIVIDUALIZATION,<br>LK_INDIVIDUALIZATION_CSV,<br>LK_INDIVIDUALIZATION_XML) a check of the value in the "gtin"<br>("Goods code") parameter will be performed: a value should be in the<br>format of 14 digital characters, consisting of numbers from 0 to 9 with<br>leading zeros for a goods code (GTIN) of 8, 12 or 13 digits |

|            |              | OMS API<br>Information on a date for activation of the remains marking for sets and<br>units of goods (except goods items described by a simplified set of attributes<br>in the NCMG) was added for the "Perfume and Eau de Toilette" and "Photo<br>cameras (except cine cameras), flash lights and flash bulbs" goods groups;<br>Asynchronous check of the order for compliance with the data from the<br>goods card in the NCMG is planned to be added for the "Alternative<br>tobacco products", "Tobacco products", "Nicotine products" goods groups<br>Implemented modifications<br>OMS API<br>As part of submission of the application report, a possibility to indicate<br>information on actual volume of production (l) in the MC structure has been<br>implemented for the "Beer, beer-based and low-alcohol beverages" goods<br>group                                         |

|                    | "Withdrawal | "gtin_weight" ("Weight in grams") parameter will be added into the<br>from<br>circulation<br>(volume<br>and<br>grade<br>accounting)"<br>(LK_GTIN_RECEIPT) document type                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                    |             | Modifications in True API methods:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                    |             | A value of the "gtin_weight" parameter ("Weight in grams") specified in the<br>"Withdrawal from circulation (volume and grade accounting)" document<br>(LK_GTIN_RECEIPT) will be returned in the "netWeight" response<br>parameter ("A total weight of the goods on the balance sheet for the current<br>date, in grams") of the "Method of obtaining of the current balance in a<br>warehouse" for the goods with an attribute of variable weight. If a weight is<br>not specified in the "gtin_weight" parameter ("Weight in grams") in the<br>"Withdrawal from circulation (volume and grade accounting)" document<br>and a weight or volume is not specified in the goods card in the NCMG,<br>weight / volume will not be transferred to income/expenditure of the TT<br>GIS warehouse. At the same time, if a weight or volume is added to the<br>goods card in the NCMG at the time of processing of the "Cancellation of<br>withdrawal from circulation (volume and grade accounting)" document<br>(LK_GTIN_RECEIPT_CANCEL), weight / volume will be transferred to<br>the TT GIS warehouse from the goods card in the NCMG and these data<br>will affect the warehouse balance. For goods without an attribute of variable<br>weight ("No" value is indicated in the "Goods with variable quantity"<br>attribute in the goods card in the NCMG), a value will correspond to a value<br>from a goods card in the NCMG. If a value of the weight or volume is equal<br>0 in the goods card in the NCMG, "netWeight" parameter ("A total weight<br>of the goods on the balance sheet for the current date, in grams") will not be<br>returned in the response;<br>A possibility of obtaining volume and weight characteristics of the goods<br>will be added in the "netWeight" ("Weight of transferred goods") and<br>"volume" ("Volume of transferred goods") response parameters for certain<br>documents affecting the balance in the "Method of getting a list of<br>operations in a warehouse" |

|------|---------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|      | nt      |                                                                           |
|      | Version |                                                                           |
|      |         | Announced modifications whose implementation has been suspended           |
|      |         | (resumption of works will be additionally announced)                      |
|      |         | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission: |
|      |         | Implementation of changes has been suspended for the "Dairy products"     |
|      |         | goods group in the document type titled "Acceptance of the shipment from  |
|      |         | EEU member states with IC recognition in case of volume and grade         |
|      |         | accounting"<br>(EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_ACCEPTANCE,                          |
|      |         | EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_ACCEPTANCE_CSV),<br>a<br>document                    |
|      |         | structure will not be changed in both formats. The following changes have |
|      |         | been suspended: a check of the repeated values in "gtin" ("Goods code")   |
|      |         | parameters for identity with the values from "tnved_code" ("EEU FEACN     |
|      |         | code (10 symbols)"), "product_cost" ("Unit price"), "product_tax" ("VAT   |
|      |         | amount"), "certificate_document_data" ("Array containing the data of the  |
|      |         | documents confirming compliance"), "certificate_type" ("Type of document  |
|      |         | confirming compliance"), "certificate_number" ("Number of document        |
|      |         | confirming compliance"), "certificate_date" ("Date of document confirming |
|      |         | compliance") parameters, a check of the value of "gtin" parameter ("Goods |
|      |         | code") for "UNIT" package type ("Unit of goods"), availability of         |
|      |         | indication from 1 to 15 AVD numbers (inclusive) (an AVD number is         |
|      |         | specified in the "vsd_number" ("AVD number") parameter) for one value     |
|      |         | specified in the "gtin" parameter ("Goods code") when indication of the   |
|      |         | same AVD number for several goods codes is unavailable                    |

|            |                         | LK_CONTRACT_COMMISSIONING_XML), a note has been added to                                |
|            |                         | "producer_inn" ("INN of product manufacturer") and "owner_inn" ("INN                    |
|            |                         | of goods owner") parameters that a verification of compliance of INN                    |
|            |                         | (returned in the response of the FGIS "VetIS") of the business entity for               |
|            |                         | which AVD has been issued, is conducted for the "Dairy products" goods                  |
|            |                         | group;                                                                                  |
|            |                         | In the "Acceptance of shipment from EEU member states with IC                           |
|            |                         | recognition in case of volume and grade accounting" document type                       |
|            |                         | (EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_ACCEPTANCE,                                                       |
|            |                         | EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_ACCEPTANCE_CSV),<br>for<br>the<br>"Dairy                           |
|            |                         | products"<br>goods<br>group,<br>repeated<br>values<br>in<br>"gtin"<br>("Goods<br>code") |
|            |                         | parameters will be checked for identity with the values from "tnved_code"               |
|            |                         | ("EEU FEACN code (10 symbols)"), "product_cost" ("Unit price"),                         |
|            |                         | "product_tax"<br>("VAT<br>amount"),<br>"certificate_document_data"<br>("Array           |
|            |                         | containing<br>the<br>data<br>of<br>the<br>documents<br>confirming<br>compliance"),      |
|            |                         | "certificate_type"<br>("Type<br>of<br>document<br>confirming<br>compliance"),           |
|            |                         | "certificate_number" ("Number of document confirming compliance"),                      |
|            |                         | "certificate_date" ("Date of document confirming compliance") parameters,               |
|            |                         | a value of "gtin" parameter ("Goods code") must be with "UNIT" package                  |
|            |                         | type ("Unit of goods"), from 1 to 15 AVD numbers (inclusive) will be                    |
|            |                         | available for indication (an AVD number is specified in the "vsd_number"                |
|            |                         | ("AVD number") parameter) for one value specified in the "gtin" ("Goods                 |
|            |                         | code") parameter, but indication of the same AVD number for several goods               |
|            |                         | codes will be unavailable. Implemented checks and features are applicable               |
|            |                         | to all document formats, and a structure of the documents does not change               |

For more details, see section "Short<br>description of changes in OMS API methods"                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |

| 22.06.2022 | 47.0                    | Announced modifications in version 47.0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|            |                         | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:<br>In the document type titled "Withdrawal from Circulation" (LK_RECEIPT,<br>LK_RECEIPT_CSV, LK_RECEIPT_XML) "document_type" ("Type of<br>primary<br>document"),<br>"document_number"<br>("Number<br>of<br>primary<br>document"),<br>"document_date"<br>("Date<br>of<br>primary<br>document"),<br>"primary_document_custom_name"<br>("Name<br>of<br>primary<br>document"),<br>"primary_document_type"<br>("Type<br>of<br>primary<br>document"),<br>"primary_document_number"<br>("Number<br>of<br>primary<br>document"),<br>"primary_document_date"<br>("Date<br>of<br>primary<br>document")<br>parameters<br>become<br>optional<br>for<br>"PACKING"<br>disposal<br>reason<br>("Prepacking"),<br>"product_cost" parameter ("Unit price") becomes mandatory.<br>Modifications in True API methods: |
|            |                         | A return of the extended information on the first 100 errors of processing of<br>the requested document of the direct submission, UTD / UCD and receipts<br>will be implemented in the "Method for getting document content by<br>identifier" (v4), "Method of receiving a content of CRE receipt by<br>identifier" (v4).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|            |                         | Implemented modifications                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|            |                         | OMS API                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|            |                         | "capacity" ("Volume") parameter was deleted from the method "Send<br>Report on MC Utilization (Application)" for the "Dairy products" goods<br>group;<br>"Method "Deletion of installation of the integration solution instance"" was<br>added;<br>"Method "Obtaining receipt by set filters"" was implemented;<br>A "name" parameter ("Name of the integration solution instance (external<br>connection)") was added into the method "Requesting registration of<br>installation of the integration solution instance";<br>Nesting logic of the aggregation report in terms of aggregation into group<br>package has been improved for the "Beer, beer-based and low-alcohol<br>beverages" goods group;                                                                                                                                                                   |

|         | Implementation of the check for a fact of blocking of the goods circulation<br>participant in EGAIS for "Beer, beer-based and low-alcohol beverages"<br>goods group when ordering a MC and submitting an application report is<br>planned for the end of 2022;<br>API v3 is being implemented to switch to a unified structure of the requests<br>and to exclude extension ("extension") from URL structure. Implementation<br>commencement — June 2022;<br>"Method "Provision of the list of installations of the integration solution<br>(external connection)"" is being implemented;<br>Shelf-life periods of the MCs will be changed for the "Packaged water"<br>goods group — up to 365 days for the orders created within distribution;<br>Submission of rejection report is being implemented for the "Alternative<br>tobacco products" goods group.<br>Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:<br>In<br>the<br>document<br>type<br>titled<br>"Withdrawal<br>from<br>Circulation",<br>when<br>withdrawing from circulation with "EEC_EXPORT" ("Export to EEU<br>countries") reason, a possibility to indicate the Republic of Belarus in<br>"destination_country_code" ("Code of the destination country") parameter<br>will be closed for all goods groups , as well as a possibility to indicate<br>identifier of the organization from the Republic of Belarus in "importer_id"<br>("INN (or analog) of the importer") field;<br>In the document type titled "Return into circulation", return of the ICs<br>previously withdrawn from circulation with "Return at remote sale" reason<br>("REMOTE_SALE_RETURN")<br>is<br>being<br>implemented<br>for<br>"Antiseptic/antibacterial skin cleansers and hand sanitizers", "Biologically<br>active food additives", "Bicycles and bicycle frames", "Dairy products",<br>"Clothing<br>items,<br>bed,<br>table,<br>bath<br>and<br>kitchen<br>linens",<br>"Footwear",<br>"Packaged water", "Photo cameras (except cine cameras), flash lights and<br>flash bulbs", "New pneumatic rubber tires and tire casings" goods groups;<br>"Return into circulation" document type (JSON) is being implemented only<br>with "Return at remote sale" |

| Date | Docume  | Changes                                                                                  |
|------|---------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|      | nt      |                                                                                          |
|      | Version |                                                                                          |
|      |         | contains "UtilisationReport" basic object without extensions;                            |
|      |         | Nesting logic of the aggregation report in terms of aggregation into group               |
|      |         | packages and aggregation of group packages was improved for the                          |
|      |         | "Biologically active food additives" goods group;                                        |
|      |         | A value of "cisType" ("Marking code type") parameter - "GROUP"                           |
|      |         | ("Group package") was added for the "Biologically active food additives"                 |
|      |         | goods group. Marking codes for group consumer packages are emitted                       |
|      |         | based on templates "templateId" = "23" and "templateId" = "30".                          |
|      |         | Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:                |
|      |         | For<br>the<br>"Packaged<br>water"<br>goods<br>group,<br>in<br>the<br>documents<br>titled |
|      |         | "Introduction into circulation. Manufacture in the Russian Federation"                   |
|      |         | (LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS),<br>"Introduction<br>into<br>circulation.<br>Contract               |
|      |         | manufacturing<br>in<br>the<br>Russian<br>Federation"                                     |
|      |         | (LK_CONTRACT_COMMISSIONING),<br>"licences"<br>("Array<br>of<br>subsoil                   |
|      |         | licenses"),<br>"licence_number"<br>("Numbers<br>of<br>subsoil<br>licenses"),             |
|      |         | "licence_date" ("License issue date") parameters have been added;                        |
|      |         | The following document parameters were added into the document types                     |
|      |         | titled "Shipment from EEU with IC recognition", "Shipment to EEU with                    |
|      |         | IC recognition (export)", "Acceptance of the shipment from EEU member                    |
|      |         | states for the document titled "Shipment from EEU with IC recognition"":                 |
|      |         | "import_data" ("Import data"), "importer_id" ("INN (or analog) of the                    |
|      |         | importer"), "importer_name" ("Importer's name"), "declaration_number"                    |
|      |         | ("Customs declaration registration number"), "declaration_date" ("Customs                |
|      |         | declaration date"), "production_data" ("Production data"), "producer_id"                 |
|      |         | ("INN (or analog) of the manufacturer"), "producer_name" ("Manufacturer                  |
|      |         | name");                                                                                  |
|      |         | For "New pneumatic rubber tires and tire casings" goods group, in the                    |
|      |         |                                                                                          |
|      |         | documents titled "Introduction into Circulation. Manufacture in the Russian              |
|      |         | Federation",<br>"production_date"<br>("Date<br>of<br>goods<br>production")<br>and        |
|      |         | "production_date" ("Date of goods manufacture from general data on goods                 |
|      |         | introduction into circulation") parameters in "products" array ("Array                   |
|      |         | containing a list of transferred goods codes") were changed to optional, in              |
|      |         | the document titled "Introduction into circulation. Contract manufacturing               |
|      |         | in the Russian Federation", "production_date" ("Date of goods production")               |
|      |         | and "production_date" ("Date of goods production") parameters in array                   |
|      |         |                                                                                          |
|      |         |                                                                                          |

| 29.04.2022 | 40.0                    | Announced modifications in version 40.0<br>OMS API                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|            |                         | A way of submission of the application report will be changed for the<br>"Medical products" goods group from automatic to manual. Automatic<br>generation and sending of the application report will be disabled. Attributes<br>set of the application report will contain "UtilisationReport" basic object<br>without extensions;<br>New method "Deletion of installation of the integration solution instance" is<br>being implemented to delete installation of the integration solution instance<br>(external connection). |
|            |                         | Implemented modifications<br>OMS API                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|            |                         | For<br>"Receipting<br>2.0",<br>a<br>new<br>type<br>of<br>receipt<br>"Closing<br>of<br>order"<br>(CLOSE_ORDER) has been added as a result of the order transfer to the<br>"CLOSED" status. One event "CLOSE_ORDER" will be generated within<br>the receipt;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|            |                         | Methods for searching, receiving and deleting draft documents have been<br>implemented: "Method "Search of documents"", "Method "Get document<br>contents"", "Method "Delete document"";<br>Minimum and maximum length values were set for order and reports<br>parameters with "string" type and without length limit.                                                                                                                                                                                                        |

|            |                         | Adding of new marking code template has been implemented for the<br>"Biologically active food additives" and "Antiseptic/antibacterial skin<br>cleansers and hand sanitizers" goods groups;<br>A length of the serial number in the MC structure has been changed from 13<br>to 7 characters for the "Beer, beer-based and low-alcohol beverages" goods<br>group;<br>Adding of actual weight has been implemented in the application report for<br>the "Dairy products" goods group;<br>"releaseMethodType"<br>parameter<br>("Method<br>of<br>goods<br>release<br>into<br>circulation") has been implemented for the "Tobacco products" goods group<br>in the method "Create marking code emission order";<br>Creation of the sets has been implemented for the "Tobacco products" goods<br>group;<br>"Create marking code emission order" method has been improved for the<br>"Packaged water" goods group: type of the marking codes issue -<br>"Remarking" (REMARK) has been implemented.<br>Modifications in the types of documents of direct information submission:<br>From February 01, 2022 on the demo environment and from March 01,<br>2022 on the production environment, for the "Clothing items, bed, table,<br>bath and kitchen linens" goods group (EEU FEACN codes 4203 10 000,<br>6106, 6201, 6202, 6302), types of documents of direct information<br>submission<br>-<br>"Shipment<br>from<br>EEU<br>with<br>IC<br>recognition"<br>(EAS_CROSSBORDER) and "Acceptance of shipment to EEU with IC<br>recognition (export)" (EAS_CROSSBORDER_EXPORT_ACCEPTANCE)<br>are available to the Operator of the Republic of Belarus, and types of |

Submission of the "Shipping with withdrawal from circulation"<br>("LP_SHIP_RECEIPT") document will be available in * .csv ,* .xml and *<br>.json formats;<br>From December 01, 2021, for the "Photo cameras (except cine cameras),<br>flash lights and flash bulbs" goods group, information cannot be submitted<br>in the documents titled "Remains description" and "Introduction into<br>circulation. Remains Marking" |

| 11.03.2022 | 35.0    | Announced modifications in version 35.0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|            |         | API of "National catalog of marked goods"                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|            |         | Optional response parameters "attr_multiplicity_type" ("Multiplicity type")<br>and "depends_attr" ("Array of context-sensitive attributes") will be added<br>into "Method /v3/attributes".                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|            |         | OMS API                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|            |         | "Production date" and "Expiration date" parameters will be added into the<br>application report for the "Biologically active food additives" goods group;<br>New methods are being implemented for searching, receiving and removing<br>draft<br>documents:<br>"Method<br>"Search<br>of<br>documents"",<br>"Method<br>"Get<br>document contents"", "Method "Delete document"";<br>New value of "cisType" ("Marking code type") parameter - "GROUP"<br>("Group package") will be added for the "Biologically active food<br>additives" goods group. Marking codes of the group consumer packages<br>will be emitted based on templates "templateId" = "23" and "templateId" =<br>"30";<br>Nesting logic of the aggregation report in terms of aggregation into group<br>packages and aggregation of group packages is being improved for the<br>"Biologically active food additives" goods group;<br>When choosing the "Payment upon application" payment type for the<br>"Packaged water" goods group, the automatic calculation of the marking |
|            |         | code expiry date is planned to be added;<br>Ordering of the marking codes is being implemented for new goods groups:<br>"Games and toys for children", "Horticultural products" (for more details,<br>see "Short description of changes in OMS API methods");                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|            |         | Goods groups names are planned to be changed: from "Wheelchairs" to<br>"Medical products", from "Non-alcoholic beverages (juices/waters)" to<br>"Juice products and non-alcoholic beverages", from "Meat products" to<br>"Meat";                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |

| Possibility to create (via TT GIS user account) or to submit (via API)<br>"Shipment" ("LP_SHIP_GOODS") document in * .csv ,* .xml, * .json<br>formats will be disabled from March 01, 2022 for "Antiseptic/antibacterial<br>skin cleansers and hand sanitizers", "Biologically active food additives",<br>"Bicycles<br>and<br>bicycle<br>frames",<br>"Perfume<br>and<br>Eau<br>de<br>Toilette",<br>"Wheelchairs", "Footwear", "Clothing items, bed, table, bath and kitchen<br>linens", "Packaged water", "Photo cameras (except cine cameras), flash<br>lights and flash bulbs", "New pneumatic rubber tires and tire casings" goods<br>groups. Submission of the document "Shipping with Withdrawal from<br>Circulation" ("LP_SHIP_RECEIPT") will be available in * .csv, * .xml and<br>* .json formats.<br>Modifications in True API methods:<br>For the "Dairy products" goods group, "expiration" array ("Array of<br>variable expiration dates") with parameters "expirationStorageDate" ("Date<br>of variable expiration date"), "storageConditionId" ("Identifier of storage<br>condition"), "storageConditionName" ("Description of storage condition")<br>returned if several expiration dates are specified in the application report of<br>the MC in the OMS, will be added into response of "Method of receiving<br>publicly available information on identification codes by list", "Method for<br>receiving publicly available brief information about ICs by list", "Method of<br>receiving the detailed information on the list of goods identification codes<br>by set filter", "Method for getting a goods card by IC", "Method of<br>receiving information on goods item by goods GTIN", "Method of receiving<br>publicly available information on identification codes by list (simplified set<br>of attributes)".<br>Modifications in TT GIS API methods<br>For the "Dairy products" goods group, "expiration" array ("Array of<br>variable expiration dates") with parameters "expirationStorageDate" ("Date<br>of variable expiration date"), "storageConditionId" ("Identifier of storage<br>condition"), "storageConditionName" ("Description of storage condition")<br>returned if several expiration dates are specified in the application report of |

| "Method of receiving the information on marked goods by IC beginning",<br>"Method of receiving the IC list with detailed information on IC using set<br>filter", "Method of receiving the list of goods by the set filter", "Method of<br>receiving the IC list by identifier".<br>Implemented modifications<br>Modifications in TT GIS API methods<br>Filtering by production date and circulation type has been implemented for<br>the "Dairy products" goods group in the following methods: "Method of<br>receiving the IC list with detailed information on IC using set filter",<br>"Method of receiving the list of goods by the set filter". Optional response<br>parameter - "productionDate" ("Production date") has been implemented for<br>the "Dairy products" goods group in the following methods: "Method of<br>receiving the IC list with detailed information on IC using set filter",<br>"Method of receiving the list of goods by the set filter", "Method of<br>receiving the information on marked goods", "Method of receiving the IC<br>list by identifier".<br>Modifications in True API methods:<br>Filtering by production date and circulation type has been implemented for<br>the "Dairy products" goods group in the following methods: "Method of<br>receiving the brief information on the list of identification codes by set<br>filter", "Method of receiving the detailed information on the list of goods<br>identification<br>codes<br>by<br>set<br>filter".<br>Optional<br>"productionDate" ("Production date") has been implemented for the "Dairy<br>products" goods group in the following methods: "Method of receiving the<br>brief information on the list of identification codes by set filter", "Method of<br>receiving the detailed information on the list of goods identification codes<br>by set filter", "Method of receiving publicly available information on<br>identification codes by list", "Method for receiving publicly available brief<br>information about ICs by list", "Method of receiving publicly available<br>information on identification codes by list (simplified set of attributes)",<br>"Method for getting a goods card by IC".<br>Announced modifications whose implementation has been suspended<br>(resumption of works will be additionally announced) | response<br>parameter<br>- |
