|            | nt      |                                                                                         |
|            | Version |                                                                                         |
| 10.02.2022 | 33.0    | Announced modifications in version 33.0                                                 |
|            |         | OMS API                                                                                 |
|            |         | Length of the serial number in the MC structure of the "Beer, beer-based                |
|            |         | and low-alcohol beverages" goods group will be changed from 13 to 7                     |
|            |         | characters;                                                                             |
|            |         | Marking codes templates will be added for the following goods groups:                   |
|            |         | "Antiseptic/antibacterial<br>skin<br>cleansers<br>and<br>hand<br>sanitizers"<br>and     |
|            |         | "Biologically active food additives";                                                   |
|            |         | Ordering of the marking codes is being implemented for the following new                |
|            |         | goods<br>groups:<br>"Non-alcoholic<br>beer",<br>"Non-alcoholic<br>beverages             |
|            |         | (juices/waters)", "Pet foods (excluding livestock feeds)", "Seafood", "Meat             |
|            |         | products";                                                                              |
|            |         | New parameter "expDateConditions" will be added into application report                 |
|            |         | for the "Dairy products" goods group (see section "Improvement of the                   |
|            |         | "Send<br>Report<br>on<br>MC<br>Utilization<br>(Application)"<br>method<br>for<br>"Dairy |
|            |         | products" goods group");                                                                |
|            |         | MCs with weight for unit of goods (cisType = "UNIT") can be specified in                |
|            |         | the application report for the "Dairy products" goods group;                            |
|            |         | A new method is being implemented to obtain draft documents and to sign                 |
|            |         | them with subsequent sending to the OMS. The draft method will be                       |
|            |         | presented in the next announced modifications;                                          |
|            |         | It is planned to disable the attached signature.                                        |
|            |         | True API and TT GIS API                                                                 |
|            |         | New<br>goods<br>groups<br>"Non-alcoholic<br>beer",<br>"Non-alcoholic<br>beverages       |
|            |         | (juices/waters)", "Pet foods (excluding livestock feeds)", "Seafood", "Meat             |
|            |         | products" are being implemented. For codes and names of new goods                       |
|            |         | groups, see section "Short description of modifications in the types of                 |
|            |         | documents of direct information submission".                                            |

|      |         | optional. In the document titled "Introduction into Circulation. Contract<br>manufacturing in the Russian Federation", "production_date" ("Date of<br>goods production") and "production_date" ("Date of goods production")<br>parameters in array "products_list" ("Array containing the list of transferred<br>goods codes") will be optional as well;<br>The following modifications are being implemented for "Withdrawal from<br>Circulation" document type (LK_RECEIPT): "buyer_inn" ("Buyer's INN")<br>and "fias_id" ("FIAS identifier") parameters will be added, "kkt_number"<br>request parameter ("CRE registration number") is deprecated, the list of<br>possible values of reasons for withdrawal will be extended for "action"<br>parameter ("Reason for withdrawal from circulation");<br>"Withdrawal<br>from<br>Circulation"<br>document<br>(LK_RECEIPT)<br>will<br>be<br>implemented for "Alternative tobacco products", "Nicotine products" and<br>"Tobacco products" goods groups.<br>Implemented modifications<br>API of "National Catalog"<br>"Method /categories" was improved: request parameters were added<br>("gismt_code" ("Code of the marked goods group"), "tnved" ("FEACN<br>code"), list of possible values of "gismt_codes" response parameter ("Code<br>of the marked goods group") was supplemented.<br>OMS API<br>Support<br>of<br>"REMARK"<br>value<br>("Remarking")<br>of<br>parameter<br>"releaseMethodType" ("Method of goods introduction into circulation") has<br>been implemented for the "Packaged water" goods group;<br>New receipt structure has been implemented ("Receipting 2.0") with the<br>following modifications:<br>•<br>in the method "Obtain the Report Processing Status", values of the<br>report processing status were added: "IN_PROGRESS" ("Report under<br>processing"),<br>"SUCCESS"<br>("Report<br>processed<br>successfully"), |  |
|      |         | "FAILED" ("Report processed with error"), "PARTIALLY" ("Report<br>processed partially") instead of "PROCESSED" status ("Report has<br>been processed");                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |  |

|      |               | •<br>"Receive receipt by unique document identifier" method was improved<br>to receive receipts by unique document identifier;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|      |               | •<br>method<br>"Receiving<br>a<br>document<br>related<br>to<br>receipt"<br>has<br>been<br>implemented to receive a document related to receipt;<br>"Get Goods Attributes" in the OMS and "Receiving of the business<br>places" methods were implemented.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|      |               | True API and TT GIS API                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|      |               | On the demo environment "Shipment to EEU with IC recognition (export)"<br>document type was implemented for the "Clothing items, bed, table, bath<br>and kitchen linens" goods group, "Shipment to EEU member states with<br>recognition of ICs in case of volume and grade accounting (export)" and<br>"Acceptance of the shipment in EEU member states with IC recognition in<br>case of volume and grade accounting" documents were implemented for the<br>"Dairy products" goods group;<br>"certificate_document_data" ("Array containing the data of the documents<br>confirming compliance") array with parameters - "certificate_type" ("Type<br>of document confirming compliance"), "certificate_number" ("Number of<br>document confirming compliance"), "certificate_date" ("Date of document<br>confirming compliance") and "product_name" ("Goods name") parameter<br>were added into "products" array ("List of transferred goods") of the<br>document "Shipment to EEU member states with recognition of ICs in case<br>of volume and grade accounting (export)" available for the "Dairy products"<br>goods group; "productGroups" ("List of the goods groups assigned to INN<br>of the goods circulation participant") basic response parameter was added<br>into "Method of checking whether goods circulation participants have been<br>registered in the TT GIS by INN' |

|            |         | From February 01, 2022 on the demo environment and from March 01,<br>2022 on the production environment, for the "Clothing items, bed, table,<br>bath and kitchen linens" goods group (EEU FEACN codes 4203 10 000,<br>6106, 6201, 6202, 6302), implementation of types of document of direct<br>information submission - "Shipment from EEU with IC recognition"<br>(EAS_CROSSBORDER) and "Acceptance of shipment to EEU with IC<br>recognition (export)" (EAS_CROSSBORDER_EXPORT_ACCEPTANCE)<br>is planned for the Operator of the Republic of Belarus, and types of<br>documents of direct information submission - "Shipment to EEU with IC<br>recognition<br>(export)"<br>(EAS_CROSSBORDER_EXPORT,<br>EAS_CROSSBORDER_EXPORT_CSV) and "Acceptance of the shipment<br>from<br>EEU<br>member<br>states"<br>(LP_ACCEPT_GOODS,<br>LP_ACCEPT_GOODS_CSV) will be available to a goods circulation |
|            |         | participant of the Russian Federation.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |

Return of the ICs previously withdrawn from<br>circulation with the reason "Return of the goods withdrawn from circulation<br>for production purposes" ("PRODUCTION_USE_RETURN") is available<br>for the "Packaged water" goods group in the document "Return into<br>circulation"                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |

| 21.01.2022 | 31.0    | Announced modifications in version 31.0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |

|            |         | "Method categories" will be used to get a tree of categories or subcategories<br>of the category specified, as well as to get categories and subcategories that<br>match the specified FEACN code;<br>In<br>the<br>section<br>"Method<br>categories",<br>"tnved"<br>("FEACN<br>code")<br>and<br>"gismt_code" ("Code of the marked goods group") request parameters were<br>added, list of possible values of "gismt_codes" response parameter ("Code<br>of the marked goods group") was expanded.<br>True API and TT GIS API<br>"certificate_document_data" ("Array containing the data of the documents<br>confirming compliance") array with parameters - "certificate_type" ("Type<br>of document confirming compliance"), "certificate_number" ("Number of<br>document confirming compliance"), "certificate_date" ("Date of document<br>confirming compliance") and "product_name" ("Goods name") parameter<br>will be added into "products" array ("List of transferred goods") of the<br>document "Shipment to EEU member states with recognition of ICs in case<br>of volume and grade accounting (export)" available for the "Dairy products"<br>goods group;<br>"Acceptance of the shipment in EEU member states with IC recognition in<br>case of volume and grade accounting" document available only to the<br>Operator of the Republic of Belarus will be implemented for the "Dairy<br>products" goods group;<br>Information on creation of sets for the "Nicotine products" goods group will<br>be available for submission in the "Aggregation" document in * .json<br>format;<br>After transforming the card of the set into a bundle card or units of goods,<br>on the side of "National Catalog" in "Method of receiving information on<br>goods item by goods GTIN", "Method of receiving the list of goods codes<br>(GTIN) of goods circulation participant by INN", the value of the "isKit"<br>parameter (""Bundle" attribute in the goods card") will change for "Perfume |
|            |         | and Eau de Toilette", "Photo cameras (except cine cameras), flash lights and<br>flash bulbs" goods groups. When transforming into a set, the value of the<br>"isSet" parameter (""Set" attribute in the goods card in the NC") will                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |

                                                                                         |

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                | For the "Dairy products" and "Packaged water" goods groups in the<br>document titled "Withdrawal from circulation", submission of information<br>on withdrawal of the MCs from circulation has been implemented for all<br>withdrawal reasons not only for the goods owner in line with the TT GIS<br>data, i.e. goods circulation participant's INN in the document may not<br>coincide with the MC owner in line with the TT GIS data. Information on<br>withdrawal of IC/GPIC/SIC/SPIC, which do not belong to the document<br>sender, can be submitted. INN of the document sender is not compared with<br>INN of the MC owner in the TT GIS. Upon successful processing of the<br>document, IC/GPIC/SIC/SPIC will remain on the owner's balance in line<br>with TT GIS data and will change the status to "RETIRED" ("Withdrawn")<br>with an indication of the specified reason for withdrawal;<br>For<br>the<br>"Packaged<br>water"<br>goods<br>group,<br>in<br>the<br>documents<br>titled<br>"Introduction into circulation. Manufacture in the Russian Federation" and<br>"Introduction into circulation. Contract manufacturing in the Russian<br>Federation", only the value of parameter "well_number" ("Water well<br>number") can be specified in the array "certificate_document_data" ("Array<br>containing the data of the documents confirming compliance") if other<br>parameters are not filled in: "certificate_document" ("Type of document<br>confirming compliance"), "certificate_document_number" ("Number of<br>document confirming compliance"), "certificate_document_date" ("Date of<br>document confirming compliance"), as well as indication of parameters of<br>array<br>"certificate_document_data"<br>is<br>available:<br>"certificate_document"<br>("Type<br>of<br>document<br>confirming<br>compliance"),<br>"certificate_document_number"<br>("Number<br>of<br>document<br>confirming<br>compliance"), "certificate_document_date" ("Date of document confirming<br>compliance") if parameter "well_number" ("Water well number") is not<br>filled in.<br>Announced modifications whose implementation has been suspended |
|                | (resumption of works will be additionally announced) |            |         | Description was updated in the section "Short description of changes in<br>OMS API methods": creation of the sets is planned to be implemented for<br>the "Nicotine products" goods group for January 2022;<br>In the section "Improvement of "Create marking code emission order"<br>method for "Nicotine products" goods group", "OrderProduct" object<br>parameter was renamed "Order", mandatory of "releaseMethodType"<br>parameter ("Method of goods release into circulation") was corrected;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|            |         | Support of new parameter value - "releaseMethodType" ("Method of goods<br>release into circulation") will be implemented for the "Tobacco products"<br>goods group;<br>The following possible values of the report processing status are being<br>implemented in the method "Obtain the Report Processing Status":<br>"IN_PROGRESS" ("Report under processing"), "SUCCESS" ("Report<br>processed successfully"), "FAILED" ("Report processed with error"),<br>"PARTIALLY" ("Report processed partially") instead of "PROCESSED"<br>status ("Report has been processed");<br>In the 1st quarter of 2022, "Receipt Structure" will be changed in terms of<br>creation of the document containing the data of the transaction start<br>document and all events that occurred as part of the transaction;<br>With implementation of new receipt structure, "Method "Receive receipt by<br>unique document identifier"" will be supported to maintain backward<br>compatibility, planned date for deactivation - second quarter of 2022;<br>"Receive receipt by unique document identifier" method was updated to<br>receive receipts by unique document identifier (see "Improvement of<br>Method "Receive receipt by unique document identifier"");<br>New method "Method "Receiving a document related to receipt"" is being |
|            |         | implemented to receive a document related to the receipt                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |

Manufacture in the<br>Russian<br>Federation"<br>and<br>"Introduction<br>into<br>Circulation.<br>Contract<br>Manufacturing in the Russian Federation", value can be specified in<br>parameter<br>"well_number"<br>("Water<br>well<br>number")<br>without<br>mandatory<br>indicating the information on the permitting documents for the "Packaged<br>water" goods group in the array "certificate_document_data" ("Array<br>containing the data of the documents confirming compliance");<br>Types of the documents titled "ACC Aggregation", "ACC Transformation"<br>and "ACC Disaggregation" will be available for "Alternative tobacco<br>products", "Nicotine products" and "Tobacco products" goods groups; |

|            |                         | The following methods of the "Export service" are implemented:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|            |                         | •<br>"Creation of the task of report export" method, "Method of obtaining a<br>list of available reports" to obtain the value of "reportId" ("ID of the<br>report") parameter required to upload the report, "Method of obtaining a<br>list of the report filters" to obtain the value of "id" ("ID of the report<br>filter") parameter required to filter the data in the report and to fill in<br>"params" ("Parameters of the task") parameter with filters and their<br>values when creating a task of report export, "Task life cycle" method to<br>obtain full information on task life cycle and related exports; |

|            |                         | OMS API                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|            |                         | Extension of basic objects - "Order" and "OrderProduct" was added into<br>Method "Creating of order for marking code emission" for "Biologically<br>active food additives" goods group;<br>Basic object - "UtilisationReport" was included into the MC Utilization<br>(Application) report for "Biologically active food additives" goods group;<br>Basic object - "AggregationReport" was included into the MC aggregation<br>report for "Biologically active food additives" goods group;<br>Basic object - "DropoutReport" was included into the MC dropout/rejection<br>report for "Biologically active food additives" goods group;<br>Method of sending a report on MC dropout/rejection is available in the<br>OMS for "Footwear" and "Clothing items, bed, table, bath and kitchen<br>linens" goods groups;<br>Issue of MCs with "Remains marking" type of introduction into circulation<br>(chosen when creating order) will be discontinued from July 01, 2021 for<br>"Alternative tobacco products" goods group;<br>"Set" ("SET") value was added into the list of available values of Catalog –<br>Marking Code Type for "Dairy products" goods group.<br>Implemented changes<br>OMS API<br>"Peasant farms (farms)/Agricultural production cooperatives" categories of<br>goods circulation participants were added for "Dairy Products" goods<br>group;<br>From June 01, 2021, emission for "Dairy products" goods group will be<br>subject to payment;<br>The support of "light" extension of URL extension parameter was stopped<br>from June 01, 2021 for "Items of clothing, bed, table, bath and kitchen<br>linens" and "Footwear" goods groups.<br>True API and TT GIS API<br>Changes were implemented in the composition of "Acceptance of shipment<br>from EEU" document to provide information on marked goods imported |

| 16.04.2021 | 9.0           | Announced modifications in version 9.0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|            |               | True API and TT GIS API                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|            |               | "withdrawal_type_other" parameter ("Other reason") will be added in the<br>structure of "Withdrawal from circulation" document in view of the<br>implementation of the features for withdrawal from circulation because of<br>"Other" reason for all goods groups except for "Alternative tobacco<br>products", "Nicotine products" and "Tobacco products" goods groups Also<br>the set of parameters of "Withdrawal from circulation" document type in *<br>.json, * .csv and * .xml formats will be increased in view of the<br>implementation of the features for withdrawal from circulation for the<br>reason of "Deal constituting a state secret" for "Dairy products" goods<br>group. |
|            |               | The changes in the composition of "Withdrawal from circulation" document<br>parameters will be implemented independently from each other: first,<br>changes are planned in connection with the features for withdrawal from<br>circulation with "Other" reason, then with "Deal constituting a state secret";<br>The previously announced activation (on July 01, 2021) of features on demo<br>environment on mandatory availability of consent (on the provision of                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|            |               | information on the ICs and nesting in the aggregates) signed by the GCPs<br>for the goods groups: "Tobacco products", "Alternative tobacco products",<br>"Footwear", "Items of clothing, bed linen, table linen, bath and kitchen<br>linen", "New pneumatic rubber tires and tire casings" for which submission<br>of information on the shipment/acceptance/transfer of ICs in whole sale and<br>retails sale segments into the TT GIS is mandatory, will not take place                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |

|            |               | Changes will be made to the way of the information submission in the<br>"Shipment", "Shipping with Withdrawal from Circulation", "Canceling<br>shipment" and "Acceptance of the shipment from EEU" documents in *<br>.xml format for the "Dairy Products" goods group;<br>Changes in the content of the "Acceptance of the shipment from EEU"<br>document to provide information on marked goods imported into the<br>Russian Federation from the territories of the member states of the EEU, in<br>accordance with the Decrees of the Government of the Russian Federation<br>No. 2099 ("Dairy products"), No. 860 ("Footwear"), No.1956 ("Items of<br>clothing, bed, table, bath and kitchen linens"), No.1958 ("Tyres and tyres<br>pneumatic rubber new"), No.1957 ("Perfume and eau de toilette"), No.1953<br>("Photo cameras (except for cine cameras), flash lights and flash bulbs");<br>It is planned to disable "Method of receiving the list of IC using document<br>number". Instead of the disabled method, "Method of receiving the list of<br>ICs and GTIN by document number" will be implemented;<br>"Method for receiving the receipt by check ID" was implemented |
